Security access control source address policy.
When SourceType for the net, Source is the source CIDR. For example: 1.2.3.0/24
When SourceType as a group, Source name for the source address book. For example: db_group
When SourceType as location, Source source region (specific region position encoder see below). For example, [ "BJ11", "ZB"]

SourceType.description:
Security access control source address type of policy.
net: Source segment (CIDR)
group: source address book
location: the source area

StartTime.description:
The start time of the policy validity period for an access control policy. It is represented in a second-level timestamp format. It must be the whole hour or half hour, and at least half an hour less than the end time.
Notes: When RepeatType is Permanent, StartTime is empty. When RepeatType is None, Daily, Weekly, Monthly, StartTime must have a value, and you need to set the start time.

AclUuid.description: Security access control ID that uniquely identifies the policy.

ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::FwSwitch.description: ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::FwSwitch is used to enable a firewall.

IpaddrList.description:
The IP address list.
**Note**: The IpaddrList, RegionList, and ResourceTypeList arguments are not allowed to be empty at the same time. A value must be set for one of the three arguments.

RegionList.description:
The region list.
**Note**: The IpaddrList, RegionList, and ResourceTypeList arguments are not allowed to be empty at the same time. A value must be set for one of the three arguments.

ResourceTypeList.description:
The asset type list. Valid values:
- BastionHostIP: Bastion machine exit IP.
- BastionHostIngressIP: The entrance IP of the fortress machine.
- EcsEIP: ECS EIP.
- EcsPublicIP: ECS public network IP.
- EIP: Elastic Public IP.
- EniEIP: Elastic Network card EIP.
- NatEIP: NAT EIP.
- SlbEIP: SLB EIP.
- SlbPublicIP: SLB public network IP.
- NatPublicIP: NAT public IP
- HAVIP: High Availability Virtual IP.
**Note**: The IpaddrList, RegionList, and ResourceTypeList arguments are not allowed to be empty at the same time. A value must be set for one of the three arguments.

ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::Instance.description: ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::Instance is used to create a Cloud Firewall instance.

AccountNum.description: The number of multi-account management and control is the number of member accounts that you need to uniformly control.

AclExtension.description: When the default access control authorization specifications of your version are not enough, you can purchase global extension specifications of access control. This extension supports shared occupancy with Internet and VPC boundary ACL specifications.

AutoPay.description: Whether to auto pay the bill.

AutoRenew.description: Whether to auto renew the prepay instance.

Bandwidth.description: Public network processing capability. Valid values: 10 to 15000. Unit: Mbps.

IgnoreExisting.description:
Whether to ignore existing cloud firewall instance
False: ROS will perform a uniqueness check.If the cloud firewall instance exists, an error will be reported when creating it.
True: ROS will not check the uniqueness.If the cloud firewall instance exists, the creation process will be ignored.
If the cloud firewall instance is not created by ROS, it will be ignored during update and delete stage.

IpNum.description: The number of public IPs that can be protected. Valid values: 20 to 4000.PremiumVersion: [20, 1000]

LogAnalysis.description: The cloud firewall includes 7 days of free log storage and auditing by default. If you need longer storage time or meet the requirements for equal protection, it is recommended to purchase the log analysis service.

LogStorage.description: Reference for purchasing storage capacity: 10M public network bandwidth, 6 months of log storage, recommended purchase of 1000GB log storage capacity

MultiAccountManagement.description: Multiple accounts on the enterprise cloud can be managed centrally on the cloud firewall, including asset inventory, ACL policies, attack protection, log reports, etc. After the member account is managed by the current account, there will be no need to purchase it separately.

NatBandwidth.description: The bandwidth of private network traffic processed by the NAT firewall. The premium version does not include it by default, the enterprise version has 10Mbps by default, and the ultimate version has 20Mbps by default.

NatFirewallNum.description: The number of NAT gateway instances of the NAT firewall you need to enable. Each NAT gateway instance corresponds to one NAT firewall instance. The premium version does not include it by default, the enterprise version comes with 1 specification by default,and the ultimate version comes with 2 specifications by default.

PayType.description:
The billing method of the firewall instance. Valid values:
PayAsYouGo: pay-as-you-go
Subscription: subscription

Period.description:
The subscription period of the firewallIf PeriodUnit is month, the valid range is 1, 3, 6
If periodUnit is year, the valid range is 1, 2, 3

PeriodUnit.description:
The unit of the subscription duration. Valid values:
Month
Year
Default value: Month.

VpcBandwidth.description: VPC network processing capability. Valid values: 1000 to 15000. Unit: Mbps.

VpcFirewallNum.description: The number of protected VPCs. It will be ignored when spec = "premium_version". Valid values between 2 and 500.

ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::NatFirewallControlPolic.description: ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::NatFirewallControlPolicy is used to add an access control policy for a NAT firewall.

AclAction.description:
The action that Cloud Firewall performs on the traffic.Valid values:
accept: allows the traffic.
drop: denies the traffic.
log: monitors the traffic.

ApplicationNameList.description: The application types supported by the access control policy.

Description.description: The description of the access control policy.

DestPort.description:
The destination port in the access control policy. Valid values:
If Proto is set to ICMP, DestPort is automatically left empty.
If Proto is set to TCP, UDP, or ANY and DestPortType is set to group, DestPort is empty.
If Proto is set to TCP, UDP, or ANY and DestPortType is set to port, the value of DestPort is the destination port number.

DestPortGroup.description: The name of the destination port address book in the access control policy.

DestPortType.description:
The type of the destination port in the access control policy. Valid values:
net: source CIDR block
group: source address book

Destination.description:
The destination address in the access control policy.
Valid values:
If DestinationType is set to net, the value of this parameter is a CIDR block.
Example: 1.2.XX.XX/24
If DestinationType is set to group, the value of this parameter is an address book.
Example: db_group
If DestinationType is set to domain, the value of this parameter is a domain name.
Example: *.aliyuncs.com
DestinationType is set to location, the value of this parameter is a location.
Example: ["BJ11", "ZB"]

DestinationType.description:
The type of the destination address in the access control policy. Valid values:
net: CIDR block
group: address book
domain: domain name

Direction.description:
The direction of the traffic to which the access control policy applies. Valid values:
out: outbound traffic

DomainResolveType.description:
The domain name resolution method of the access control policy. Valid values:
0: fully qualified domain name (FQDN)-based resolution
1: Domain Name System (DNS)-based dynamic resolution
2: FQDN and DNS-based dynamic resolution

EndTime.description: The time when the access control policy stops taking effect. The value is a UNIX timestamp. Unit: seconds. The value must be on the hour or on the half hour, and at least 30 minutes later than the value of StartTime.

IpVersion.description:
The IP version supported by the access control policy. Valid values:
4: IPv4 (default)

NatGatewayId.description: The ID of the NAT gateway.

NewOrder.description: The priority of the access control policy. The priority value starts from 1. A small priority value indicates a high priority.

Proto.description:
The protocol type in the access control policy.Valid values:
ANY: all types of protocols
TCP
UDP
ICMP

Release.description:
Specifies whether to enable the access control policy. By default, an access control policy is enabled after it is created. Valid values:
true
false

RepeatDays.description:
The days of a week or of a month on which the access control policy takes effect.
If RepeatType is set to Permanent, None, or Daily, RepeatDays is left empty. Example: [].
If RepeatType is set to Weekly, RepeatDays must be specified. Example: [0, 6].
If RepeatType is set to Monthly, RepeatDays must be specified. Example: [1, 31].

RepeatEndTime.description: The point in time when the recurrence ends. Example: 23:30. The value must be on the hour or on the half hour, and at least 30 minutes later than the value of RepeatStartTime.

RepeatStartTime.description: The point in time when the recurrence starts. Example: 08:00. The value must be on the hour or on the half hour, and at least 30 minutes earlier than the value of RepeatEndTime.

RepeatType.description:
The recurrence type for the access control policy to take effect. Valid values:
Permanent (default): The policy always takes effect.
None: The policy takes effect for only once.
Daily: The policy takes effect on a daily basis.
Weekly: The policy takes effect on a weekly basis.
Monthly: The policy takes effect on a monthly basis.

Source.description:
The source address in the access control policy.Valid values:
If SourceType is set to net, the value of Source is a CIDR block.Example: 10.2.4.0/24
If SourceType is set to group, the value of this parameter must be an address book name.Example: db_group

SourceType.description:
The type of the source address in the access control policy.Valid values:
net: source CIDR block
group: source address book

StartTime.description: The time when the access control policy starts to take effect. The value is a UNIX timestamp. Unit: seconds. The value must be on the hour or on the half hour, and at least 30 minutes earlier than the value of EndTime.

AclUuid.description: The unique ID of the access control policy.

Direction.description: The direction of the traffic to which the access control policy applies.

NatGatewayId.description: The ID of the NAT gateway.

ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::TrFirewall.description: ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::TrFirewall is used to create a virtual private cloud (VPC) firewall for a transit router.

CenId.description: The ID of the Cloud Enterprise Network (CEN) instance.

FirewallSubnetCidr.description: The subnet CIDR block of the VPC in which the ENI of the firewall is stored in automatic mode.

FirewallVpcCidr.description: The CIDR block that is allocated to the VPC created for the VPC firewall in automatic mode.

FirewallVpcId.description: The ID of the VPC in which the ENI associated with the VPC firewall is created in manual mode.

FirewallVswitchId.description: The ID of the vSwitch that is used to create the ENI in manual mode.

RegionNo.description: The region ID of the route router.

RouteMode.description:
The routing mode of the VPC firewall. Valid values:
managed: automatic mode
manual: manual mode

TrAttachmentMasterCidr.description: The primary subnet CIDR block that the VPC uses to connect to the transit router in automatic mode.

TrAttachmentMasterZone.description: The primary zone for the vSwitch.

TrAttachmentSlaveCidr.description: The secondary subnet CIDR block that the VPC uses to connect to the transit router in automatic mode.

TrAttachmentSlaveZone.description: The secondary zone for the vSwitch.

TransitRouterId.description: The ID of the transit router.

FirewallId.description: The instance ID of the VPC firewall.

ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::TrFirewallRoutePolicy.description: ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::TrFirewallRoutePolicy is used to create a routing policy for a virtual private cloud (VPC) firewall of a transit router.

FirewallId.description: The instance ID of the VPC firewall.

PolicyDescription.description: The description of the traffic redirection instance.

PolicyName.description: The name of the traffic redirection instance.

PolicyType.description:
The type of the traffic redirection scenario of the VPC firewall. Valid values:
fullmesh: interconnected instances
one_to_one: instance to instance
end_to_end: instance to instances

FirewallId.description: The instance ID of the VPC firewall.

TrFirewallRoutePolicyId.description: The ID of the routing policy.

ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::VpcFirewallCen.description: ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::VpcFirewallCen is used to create a virtual private cloud (VPC) firewall.

CenId.description: The ID of the CEN instance.

FirewallSwitch.description:
Specifies whether to enable the VPC firewall. Valid values:
open: After you create the VPC firewall, the VPC firewall is automatically enabled. This is the default value.
close: After you create the VPC firewall, the VPC firewall is disabled. You can call the ModifyVpcFirewallCenSwitchStatus operation to manually enable the VPC firewall.

FirewallVSwitchCidrBlock.description: The CIDR block of the vSwitch that is automatically created for the VPC firewall.You must specify a CIDR block for the Cloud_Firewall_VSWITCH VPC that is automatically created for the VPC firewall for traffic redirection. The CIDR block does not conflict with your network plan. The subnet mask of the CIDR block must be less than or equal to 29 bits in length. The CIDR block of the vSwitch must be within the network segment of the VPC.If you do not specify a value, the CIDR block 10.219.219.216/29 is automatically allocated.

FirewallVpcCidrBlock.description: The CIDR block of the VPC that is automatically created for the VPC firewall. You must specify a CIDR block for the Cloud_Firewall_VPC VPC that is automatically created for the VPC firewall for traffic redirection. The subnet mask of the CIDR block must be less than or equal to 28 bits in length.If you do not specify a value, the CIDR block 10.0.0.0/8 is automatically allocated.

FirewallVpcZoneId.description: The ID of the zone to which the vSwitch belongs. If your service is latency-sensitive, you can specify the same zone for the vSwitch of the firewall and the vSwitch of your business VPC to minimize latency.If you do not specify a value, a zone is automatically assigned for the vSwitch.

MemberUid.description: The UID of the member that is managed by your Alibaba Cloud account.

NetworkInstanceId.description: The ID of the VPC for which you want to create the VPC firewall.

VSwitchId.description: The ID of the vSwitch that is used to associate with the elastic network interface (ENI) required by the VPC firewall.

VpcFirewallName.description: The instance name of the VPC firewall.

VpcRegion.description: The ID of the region to which the VPC belongs.

VpcFirewallId.description: The instance ID of the VPC firewall.

ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::VpcFirewallConfigure.description: ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::VpcFirewallConfigure is used to create a virtual private cloud (VPC) firewall.

FirewallSwitch.description:
The status of the VPC firewall after you create the firewall. Valid values:
open: After you create the VPC firewall, the VPC firewall is automatically enabled. This is the default value.
close: After you create the VPC firewall, the VPC firewall is disabled. To enable the firewall, you can call the ModifyVpcFirewallSwitchStatus operation.

LocalVpcCidrTableList.description: The CIDR blocks of the local VPC.

LocalVpcId.description: The ID of the local VPC.

LocalVpcRegion.description: The region ID of the local VPC.

MemberUid.description: The UID of the member that is managed by your Alibaba Cloud account.

PeerVpcCidrTableList.description: The CIDR blocks of the peer VPC.

PeerVpcId.description: The ID of the peer VPC.

PeerVpcRegion.description: The region ID of the peer VPC.

VpcFirewallName.description: The instance name of the VPC firewall.

VpcFirewallId.description: The instance ID of the VPC firewall.

ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::VpcFirewallControlPolic.description: The ALIYUN::CLOUDFW::VpcFirewallControlPolicy resource type adds access control policies to specified VPC firewall policy groups.

AclAction.description:
The action that Cloud Firewall performs on the traffic. Valid values:
accept: allows the traffic.
drop: denies the traffic.
log: monitors the traffic.

ApplicationName.description:
The application type that the access control policy supports.
Valid values: 
ANY (indicates that all application types are supported) 
FTP 
HTTP 
HTTPS 
MySQL 
SMTP 
SMTPS 
RDP 
VNC 
SSH 
Redis 
MQTT 
MongoDB 
Memcache 
SSL

ApplicationNameList.description: List of application types supported by the access control policy.

Description.description: The description of the access control policy.

DestPort.description:
The destination port in the access control policy.
Note This parameter must be specified if the DestPortType parameter is set to port.

DestPortGroup.description:
The address book of destination ports in the access control policy.
Note This parameter must be specified if the DestPortType parameter is set to group.

DestPortType.description:
The type of the destination port in the access control policy. Valid values:
port: port
group: address book

Destination.description:
The destination address in the access control policy.
Set this parameter in the following way:
If the DestinationType parameter is set to net, set the value to a Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) block.
Example: 10.2.3.0/24.
If the DestinationType parameter is set to group, set the value to the name of an address book.
Example: db_group.
If the DestinationType parameter is set to domain, set the value to a domain name.
Example: *.aliyuncs.com.

DestinationType.description:
The type of the destination address in the access control policy. Valid values:
net: CIDR block
group: address book
domain: domain name

DomainResolveType.description:
The domain resolution method of the access control policy. Valid values:
- FQDN: Based on FQDN
- DNS: Based on DNS dynamic resolution
- FQDN_AND_DNS: Based on both FQDN and DNS dynamic resolution

EndTime.description:
The end time of the policy validity period for an access control policy. It is represented in a second-level timestamp format. It must be the whole hour or half hour, and at least half an hour greater than the start time.
Notes: When RepeatType is Permanent, EndTime is empty. When RepeatType is None, Daily, Weekly, Monthly, EndTime must have a value, and you need to set the end time.

Lang.description:
The natural language of the request and response. Valid values:
zh: Chinese
en: English

MemberUid.description: Member account UID of current Alibaba Cloud account.

NewOrder.description:
The priority of the access control policy.
The priority value starts from 1. A smaller priority value indicates a higher priority.
Note The value of -1 indicates the lowest priority.

Proto.description: The type of the security protocol in the access control policy.

Release.description:
The enabled state of the access control policy. This policy is enabled by default when it is created. Value:
- true: Access control policy is enabled
- false: Access control policy is not enabled

RepeatDays.description:
A collection of repeated dates of policy validity for an access control policy.
When RepeatType is Permanent, None, and Daily, RepeatDays is an empty set. For example: []
When RepeatType is Weekly, RepeatDays cannot be empty. Example: [0, 6]
Notes: When RepeatType is set to Weekly, RepeatDays is not allowed.
When RepeatType is Monthly, RepeatDays cannot be empty. Examples: [1, 31]
Notes: When RepeatType is set to Monthly, RepeatDays is not allowed to repeat.

RepeatEndTime.description:
The repeated end time of the policy validity period for an access control policy. For example: 08:00, must be the hour or half time, and less than the repeat start time at least half an hour.
Notes: When RepeatType is Permanent and None, RepeatEndTime is empty. When RepeatType is Daily, Weekly, or Monthly, RepeatEndTime musthave a value, and you need to set the repeat end time.

RepeatStartTime.description:
The repeated start time of the policy validity period for an access control policy. For example: 08:00, must be the hour or half time, and less than the repeat end time at least half an hour.
Notes: When RepeatType is Permanent and None, RepeatStartTime is empty. When RepeatType is Daily, Weekly, or Monthly, RepeatStartTime must have a value, and you need to set the repeat start time.

RepeatType.description:
The repetition type of the policy validity period for an access control policy. Valid values:
- Permanent (default)
- None
- Daily
- Weekly
- Monthly.

Source.description:
The source address in the access control policy.
If the SourceType parameter is set to net, set the value to a CIDR block. Example: 10.2.3.0/24.
If the SourceType parameter is set to group, set the value to the name of an address book. Example: db_group.

SourceType.description:
The type of the source address in the access control policy. Valid values:
net: CIDR block
group: address book

StartTime.description:
The start time of the policy validity period for an access control policy. It is represented in a second-level timestamp format. It must be the whole hour or half hour, and at least half an hour less than the end time.
Notes: When RepeatType is Permanent, StartTime is empty. When RepeatType is None, Daily, Weekly, Monthly, StartTime must have a value, and you need to set the start time.

VpcFirewallId.description:
The ID of the policy group to which you want to add the access control policy.
If the VPC firewall is used to protect CEN, set the value to the ID of the CEN instance
that the VPC firewall protects. Example: cen-ervw5jbw1234*****.
If the VPC firewall is used to protect Express Connect, set the value to the ID of
the VPC firewall instance. Example: vfw-a42bbb748c91234*****.
Note You can call the DescribeVpcFirewallAclGroupList operation to query the ID of the policy group.

AclUuid.description: The unique ID of the access control policy.

ALIYUN::CMS::Contact.description: ALIYUN::CMS::Contact is used to create an alert contact.

ContactName.description: The name of the alarm contact.

Describe.description: The description of the alert contact.

ContactName.description: The name of the alarm contact.

ALIYUN::CMS::ContactGroup.description: ALIYUN::CMS::ContactGroup is used to create an alert contact group.

ContactGroupName.description: The name of the alert contact group.

ContactNames.description: The name of the alert contact.

Describe.description: The description of the alert contact group.

EnableSubscribed.description: Whether to enable the subscription feature.

ContactGroupName.description: The name of the alert contact group.

ALIYUN::CMS::DynamicTagGroup.description: ALIYUN::CMS::DynamicTagGroup is used to create a tag rule based on which cloud resources are automatically added to an application group.

EnableInstallAgent.description:
Whether to enable initial installation monitoring plug, not installed by default. Values are:
true: enable installation
Note If ECS generated instances group does not monitor plug-in installed will attempt to automatically install.
false: disable installation

EnableSubscribeEvent.description:
Whether the event subscription is enabled. Values are
:true: enable event subscription
false: disable event subscription

MatchExpress.description: Matching list. Only supports one currently.

MatchExpressFilterRelation.description:
The relationship between the conditional expressions. Values are:
and: the relationship between
or: the relationship or the
Description currently supports only one combination of conditions, the follow-up Ali cloud will support a variety of combinations of conditions.

TemplateIdList.description:
Alarm template ID list.
When the automatically generated application group synchronizes tags, it will generate alarm rules according to the specified alarm template.

ALIYUN::CMS::EventRule.description: ALIYUN::CMS::EventRule is used to create or modify an event-triggered alert rule. If the specified rule name does not exist, an event-triggered alert rule is created. If the specified rule name exists, the specified event-triggered alert rule is modified.

Description.description: The description of the alert rule.

EventPattern.description: Event pattern configuration.A maximum of 20 event patterns.

EventType.description:
The type of the event alert. Valid values:
SYSTEM
CUSTOM

GroupId.description: The ID of the application group.

RuleName.description: The name of the alarm rule.

State.description:
The status of the alert rule. Valid values:
ENABLED
DISABLED

ALIYUN::CMS::EventRuleTargets.description: ALIYUN::CMS::EventRuleTargets is used to add or change the recipients to which alert notifications are sent based on an event-triggered alert rule.

RuleName.description: The name of the alert rule.

ALIYUN::CMS::GroupMetricRule.description: ALIYUN::CMS::GroupMetricRule is used to create an alert rule for an application group.

Category.description:
The abbreviation of the service name. Valid values:
ECS (including Alibaba Cloud and non-Alibaba Cloud hosts)
RDS (ApsaraDB for RDS)
ADS (AnalyticDB)
SLB (Server Load Balancer)
VPC (Virtual Private Cloud)
APIGATEWAY (API Gateway)
CDN
CS (Container Service for Swarm)
DCDN (Dynamic Route for CDN)
DDoS (distributed denial of service)
EIP (Elastic IP)
ELASTICSEARCH (Elasticsearch)
EMR (E-MapReduce)
ESS (Auto Scaling)
HBASE (ApsaraDB for HBase)
IOT_EDGE (IoT Edge)
K8S_POD (k8s pod)
KVSTORE_SHARDING (ApsaraDB for Redis cluster version)
KVSTORE_SPLITRW (ApsaraDB for Redis read/write splitting version)
KVSTORE_STANDARD (ApsaraDB for Redis standard version)
MEMCACHE (ApsaraDB for Memcache)
MNS (Message Service)
MONGODB (ApsaraDB for MongoDB replica set instances)
MONGODB_CLUSTER (ApsaraDB for MongoDB cluster version)
MONGODB_SHARDING (ApsaraDB for MongoDB sharded clusters)
MQ_TOPIC (Message Service topic)
OCS (original version of ApsaraDB for Memcache)
OPENSEARCH (Open Search)
OSS (Object Storage Service)
POLARDB (ApsaraDB for POLARDB)
PETADATA (HybridDB for MySQL)
SCDN (Secure Content Delivery Network)
SHAREBANDWIDTHPACKAGES (shared bandwidth package)
SLS (Log Service)
VPN (VPN Gateway)

EffectiveInterval.description: The period when the alert rule is effective.

EmailSubject.description: The subject of the alert notification email.

ExtraDimensionJson.description:
The secondary or tertiary dimensions of the alert rule in the application group.

Format: a collection of key:value pairs, for example, `port:80` or `/dev/xvda:d-m5e6yphgzn3aprwu****`.

When the first-level dimension of the alert rule is `{"instanceId":"i-m5e1qg6uo38rztr4****"}`, its secondary dimension is the disk `{"/dev/xvda":"d-m5e6yphgzn3aprwu****"}`.

MetricName.description: The name of the metric. For more information, call DescribeMetricMetaList or see Preset metrics reference.

Namespace.description:
The data namespace of the service. For more information, call DescribeMetricMetaList
or see Preset metrics reference.

NoDataPolicy.description:
The handling method when there is no monitoring data. Valid values:
- KEEP_LAST_STATE (default): No action is taken.
- INSUFFICIENT_DATA: Alert content is "No Data".
- OK: Normal.

NoEffectiveInterval.description: The period when the alert rule is ineffective.

Options.description:
The advanced settings.

Format: `{"key1":"value1","key2":"value2"}`, for example, `{"NotSendOK":true}`, indicating whether to send alert recovery notifications. The key is `NotSendOK`, and the value is `true` (do not send) or `false` (send by default).

Period.description: The aggregation period. Unite: second.

RuleId.description:
The ID of the alert rule. The IDs of alert rules are generated by callers to ensure
uniqueness.

RuleName.description: The name of the alert rule.

SilenceTime.description:
The duration of the mute period during which new alerts are not sent even if the trigger
conditions are met. Unit: second. Default value: 86400. Minimum value: 60.

Webhook.description: The URL of the callback triggered when an alert occurs.

ALIYUN::CMS::MetricRuleTargets.description: ALIYUN::CMS::MetricRuleTargets is used to add or modify one or more message resources for an alert rule.

RuleId.description: The ID of the alert rule.

ALIYUN::CMS::MetricRuleTemplate.description: ALIYUN::CMS::MetricRuleTemplate is used to create an alert template.

Description.description: The description of the alert template.

Name.description: The name of the alert template.

RestVersion.description:
The version of the alert template. Call DescribeMetricRuleTemplateList or DescribeMetricRuleTemplateAttribute
to obtain information about the alert templates. The combination of version and ID
uniquely identifies an alert template.

TemplateId.description: The ID of the alert template.

ALIYUN::CMS::MetricRuleTemplateDeploymen.description: ALIYUN::CMS::MetricRuleTemplateDeployment is used to apply an alert template to an application group.

AppendMode.description:
Template application policy.Value:
all: Delete all rules created by the alarm template on the selected group, and then create a new alarm rule by the template (default).
append: Delete the rules created by the alarm template on the selected group, and then create a new alarm rule based on the current template.

ApplyMode.description:
How to apply templates.Value:
GROUP_INSTANCE_FIRST: Application grouping instances are preferred.When applying an alarm template, the application grouping instance is preferred. If the instance does not exist in the application grouping, the rules in the template are ignored.
ALARM_TEMPLATE_FIRST: Alarm template instances are preferred.When an alarm template is applied, an alarm rule is created regardless of whether the instance exists in the application group.

EnableEndTime.description: The end time when the alarm takes effect.Value range: 0~23, indicating 00:59 to 23:59.

EnableStartTime.description: The start time when the alarm takes effect.Value range: 0~23, indicating 00:00 to 23:00.

GroupId.description:
Apply group ID.
For how to get the application group ID, see DescribeMonitorGroups.

NotifyLevel.description:
Alarm notification method.Value:
2: Phone + SMS + Email + Wangwang + DingTalk Robot.
3: SMS + Email + Wangwang + DingTalk Robot.
4: Wangwang + Dingding Robot.

SilenceTime.description:
Channel silence period.Unit: seconds.Default value: 86400.
Note When the monitoring data continues to exceed the alarm rule threshold, only one alarm notification will be sent during each silence cycle.

TemplateIds.description:
The ID list of the Alarm Template to be applied.
For how to get the alarm template ID, see DescribeMetricRuleTemplateList.

Webhook.description: When an alarm occurs, the specified URL address will be called back and a POST request will be sent.

GroupId.description: The ID of the group that applied the template to.

RuleIds.description: The IDs of rhe generated rules.

ALIYUN::CMS::MonitorGroup.description: ALIYUN::CMS::MonitorGroup is used to create an application group.

ContactGroups.description:
The alert contact group. Alert notifications for the application group are sent to
the specified alert contact group.

GroupName.description: The name of the application group.

GroupId.description: Application group ID generated after the group is created.

ALIYUN::CMS::MonitorGroupInstances.description: ALIYUN::CMS::MonitorGroupInstances is used to add instances to an application group.

GroupId.description: The ID of the application group.
The ID of the application group.

ALIYUN::CMS::MonitoringAgent.description: ALIYUN::CMS::MonitoringAgent is used to install the CloudMonitor agent on Alibaba Cloud hosts.

Force.description:
Specifies whether to install the CloudMonitor agent. Valid values:
true (default value): yes
false: no

InstallCommand.description:
Specifies whether to install the CloudMonitor agent on all ECS instances that belong to the current Alibaba Cloud account. Valid values:
onlyInstallNotHasAgent: installs the latest version of the CloudMonitor agent only on ECS instances on which the agent is not installed.
onlyUpgradeAgent: upgrades the CloudMonitor agent to the latest version only for ECS instances on which an earlier version of the agent is installed.
installAndUpgrade: installs the latest version of the CloudMonitor agent on ECS instances on which the agent is not installed, and upgrades the CloudMonitor agent to the latest version for ECS instances on which an earlier version of the agent is installed.
Note If you set the InstallCommand parameter, the InstanceIds parameter does not take effect.

InstanceIds.description:
Alibaba Cloud host ID.
The range of n: 1 ~ 10.
Explain that InstallCommand and InstanceIds must be selected one by one.

ALIYUN::CMS::MonitoringAgentProcess.description: ALIYUN::CMS::MonitoringAgentProcess is used to create a process monitoring task.

ProcessUser.description: The user who launched the process.

ALIYUN::CMS::Namespace.description: ALIYUN::CMS::Namespace is used to create a namespace.

Description.description: The description of the namespace.

Namespace.description:
The name of the namespace.
The name can contain lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens (-).

Specification.description:
The data retention period of the namespace. Valid values:
- cms.s1.large: Data storage duration is 15 days.
- cms.s1.xlarge: Data storage duration is 32 days.
- cms.s1.2xlarge: Data storage duration 63 days.
- cms.s1.3xlarge: Data storage duration 93 days.
- cms.s1.6xlarge: Data storage duration 185 days.
- cms.s1.12xlarge: Data storage duration 376 days.

CreateTime.description:
The timestamp that was generated when the namespace was created.
Unit: milliseconds.

Description.description: The description of the namespace.

ModifyTime.description: The timestamp that was generated when the namespace was last modified.

Namespace.description: The namespace for the Alibaba Cloud service.

Specification.description:
The data retention period of the namespace. Valid values:
- cms.s1.large: Data storage duration is 15 days.
- cms.s1.xlarge: Data storage duration is 32 days.
- cms.s1.2xlarge: Data storage duration 63 days.
- cms.s1.3xlarge: Data storage duration 93 days.
- cms.s1.6xlarge: Data storage duration 185 days.
- cms.s1.12xlarge: Data storage duration 376 days.

ALIYUN::CMS::ResourceMetricRule.description: ALIYUN::CMS::ResourceMetricRule is used to create a threshold-triggered alert rule for a metric of a resource.

CompositeExpression.description:
The trigger conditions for multiple metrics.
Note: The trigger conditions for a single metric and multiple metrics are mutually exclusive. You cannot specify trigger conditions for a single metric and multiple metrics at the same time.

ContactGroups.description:
The alert contact group.
The alert notifications are sent to the contacts that belong to the alert contact group.
Note: An alert contact group can contain one or more alert contacts. For information about how to create alert contacts and alert contact groups, see PutContact and PutContactGroup.

DeletionForce.description: Whether to delete rule even if it is not created by ROS. Default is false

EffectiveInterval.description: The time period during which the alert rule is effective.

EmailSubject.description: The subject of the alert notification email.

Escalations.description: You must select at least one of the Critical, Warn, and Info alert levels.

Interval.description:
The interval at which the alert is triggered. Unit: seconds.
Note: For information about how to query the statistical period of a metric, see Appendix 1: Metrics.

MetricName.description:
The name of the metric.
For information about how to query the name of a metric, see Appendix 1: Metrics.
Note: If you create a Prometheus alert rule for Hybrid Cloud Monitoring, you must set this parameter to the name of the namespace. For information about how to obtain the name of a namespace, see DescribeHybridMonitorNamespaceList.

Namespace.description:
The namespace of the cloud service.
For information about how to query the namespace of a cloud service, Appendix 1: Metrics.
Note: If you create a Prometheus alert rule for Hybrid Cloud Monitoring, you must set this parameter to acs_prometheus.

NoDataPolicy.description:
The processing method of alerts when no monitoring data is found. Valid values:
- KEEP_LAST_STATE (default value): No operation is performed.
- INSUFFICIENT_DATA: An alert whose content is "Insufficient data" is triggered.
- OK: The status is considered normal.

NoEffectiveInterval.description: The time period during which the alert rule is ineffective.

Period.description:
The statistical period of the metric. Unit: seconds. The default value is the interval at which the monitoring data of the metric is collected.
Note: For information about how to query the statistical period of a metric, see Appendix 1: Metrics.

Prometheus.description:
The Prometheus alert rule.
Note: This parameter is required only when you create a Prometheus alert rule for Hybrid Cloud Monitoring.

Resources.description:
The information about the resource.
Examples: [{"instanceId":"i-uf6j91r34rnwawoo****"}] and [{"userId":"100931896542****"}].
For information about the supported dimensions that are used to query resources, see Appendix 1: Metrics.

RuleId.description:
The ID of the alert rule. If not specified, ROS will generate one.
You can specify a new ID or the ID of an existing alert rule. For information about how to query the ID of an alert rule, see DescribeMetricRuleList.
Note: If you specify a new ID, a threshold-triggered alert rule is created.

RuleName.description:
The name of the alert rule. If not specified and the rule is created by ROS, default to RuleId.
You can specify a new name or the name of an existing alert rule. For information about how to query the name of an alert rule, see DescribeMetricRuleList.
Note: If you specify a new name, a threshold-triggered alert rule is created.

SilenceTime.description:
The mute period during which new alerts are not sent even if the trigger conditions are met. Unit: seconds. Default value: 86400.
Note: If an alert is not cleared within the mute period, a new alert notification is sent when the mute period ends.

Webhook.description: The callback URL to which a POST request is sent when an alert is triggered based on the alert rule.

RuleId.description: The ID of the alert rule.

RuleName.description: The name of the alert rule.

ALIYUN::CMS::SiteMonitor.description: ALIYUN::CMS::SiteMonitor is used to create a site monitoring task.

Address.description: The URL or IP address monitored by the monitoring task.

Interval.description:
The interval at which detection requests are sent. Valid values: 1, 5, and 15. Unit:
minutes. Default value: 1.

IspCities.description:
The information about detection points, which is specified in a JSON array. Example:
[{"city":"546","isp":"465"},{"city":"572","isp":"465"},{"city":"738","isp":"465"}]. The three city codes represent Beijing, Hangzhou, and Qingdao.
Note You can call the DescribeSiteMonitorISPCityList API operation to query the detection
points that can be used to create site monitoring tasks. For more information, see
DescribeSiteMonitorISPCityList . If this parameter is not specified, the system randomly selects three detection
points for site monitoring.

OptionsJson.description:
The extended options of the protocol that is used by the site monitoring task. The
options vary based on the protocol.

TaskName.description:
The name of the site monitoring task. The name must be 4 to 100 characters in length.
It can contain letters, digits, and underscores (_).

TaskType.description:
The protocol used by the site monitoring task. Valid values: HTTP, HTTPS, PING, TCP,
UDP, DNS, SMTP, POP3, and FTP.

TaskId.description: The ID of the site monitoring task.

ALIYUN::CMS::SlsGroup.description: ALIYUN::CMS::SlsGroup is used to create a Logstore group for the metrics of Simple Log Service logs.

SlsGroupConfig.description: The configurations of the Logstore group.Valid values of N: 1 to 25.

SlsGroupDescription.description: The description of the Logstore group.

SlsGroupName.description: The name of the Logstore group.The name must be 2 to 32 characters in length and can contain uppercase letters, lowercase letters, digits, and underscores (_). The name must start with a letter.

CreateTime.description: The creation time of the Logstore group.

SlsGroupConfig.description: The configurations of the Logstore group.

SlsGroupDescription.description: The description of the Logstore group.

SlsGroupName.description: The name of the Logstore group.

ALIYUN::CR::Instance.description: ALIYUN::CR::Instance is used to create a Container Registry Enterprise Edition instance.

InstanceName.description: Instance name.The value contains 3 to 30 lowercase letters, digits, and delimiters "-"(it can not be first or last).

InstanceType.description:
The Value configuration of the Group 1 attribute of Container Mirror Service Enterprise Edition. Valid values:
Basic: Basic instance
Standard: Standard instance
Advanced: Advanced Edition Instance.

Period.description: Prepaid cycle. The unit is Monthly, please enter an integer multiple of 12 for annual paid products.

RenewPeriod.description:
Automatic renewal cycle, in months.
When RenewalStatus is set to AutoRenewal, it must be set.

RenewalStatus.description:
Automatic renewal status, value:
- AutoRenewal: automatic renewal.
- ManualRenewal: manual renewal.
Default ManualRenewal.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of the resource group.

CreateTime.description: The creation time of the resource.

InstanceId.description: The first ID of the resource.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of the resource group.

ALIYUN::CR::InstanceEndpointAclPolicy.description: ALIYUN::CR::InstanceEndpointAclPolicy is used to create a whitelist policy for the public endpoint of an instance.

AutoEnableType.description: Whether to auto enable the type of the endpoint.

Entry.description: The IP address range that is allowed to access the instance.

ModuleName.description:
The name of the module in the instance for which a whitelist is configured. Valid
values: Registry and Chart.

RegionId.description: Region ID of instance. Default is current region.

Entry.description: The IP address range that is allowed to access the instance.

ALIYUN::CR::InstanceVpcEndpointLinkedVpc.description: ALIYUN::CR::InstanceVpcEndpointLinkedVpc is used to associate a virtual private cloud (VPC) with a Container Registry instance.

EnableCreateDNSRecordInPvzt.description:
Whether to automatically create Privatezone records. 
If you enable automatic Privatezone record creation, Privatezone records will be automatically created when VPC instances are added.
Valid values:
- **true**: Automatically creates a Privatezone record.
- **false** (default): Do not automatically create Privatezone records.

ModuleName.description:
The name of the module in the instance for which a whitelist is configured. Valid values:
- **Registry** (default): Access the image repository.
- **Chart**: Access Helm Chart.

VpcId.description: The ID of the vpc.
The ID of the vpc.

ALIYUN::CR::Namespace.description: ALIYUN::CR::Namespace is used to create a namespace.

AutoCreate.description: Specifies whether to automatically create an image repository.

DefaultVisibility.description: The default type of the repository that is automatically created. Valid values: PUBLIC, PRIVATE.

InstanceId.description: The ID of the enterprise edition instance which namespace belongs to. If not provided, will use personal edition instance as default.
The ID of the enterprise edition instance which namespace belongs to.
The ID of the CR instance.

NamespaceName.description: The name of the CR namespace.

RepoName.description: The name of the repository. This parameter is required when SyncScope is REPO.

RepoNameFilter.description: The regular expression that is used to filter repositories.

SyncRuleName.description: The name of the image sync rule.

SyncScope.description: The synchronization scope. Valid values: REPO, NAMESPACE

SyncTrigger.description: The mode of triggering the synchronization rule. Valid values: INITIATIVE, PASSIVE

TargetInstanceId.description: The ID of the destination instance.

TargetNamespaceName.description: The name of the destination namespace.

TargetRegionId.description: The ID of the destination region.

TargetRepoName.description: The name of the destination image repository. This parameter is optional.

TargetUserId.description: The user ID (UID) of the account to which the destination instance belongs.

SyncRuleId.description: The ID of the synchronization rule.

ALIYUN::CR::Repository.description: ALIYUN::CR::Repository is used to create an image repository.

InstanceId.description: The ID of the enterprise edition instance which repository belongs to. If not provided, will use personal edition instance as default.

RepoNamespace.description: The name of the namespace to which the repository belongs.

RepoType.description: The type of the repository. Valid values: PUBLIC, PRIVATE.

TagImmutability.description: Specifies whether the repository is immutable. Only takes effect when InstanceId is specified.

InstanceId.description: The ID of the enterprise edition instance which repository belongs to.

RepoNamespace.description: The name of the namespace to which the repository belongs.

ALIYUN::CR::UserInfo.description: ALIYUN::CR::UserInfo is used to create the information about a user.

InstanceId.description: The ID of enterprise edition ACR instance.

User.description: User info. If user exists, will update user info.

ALIYUN::CS::ASKCluster.description: The ALIYUN::CS::ASKCluster resource type creates an ACK Serverless cluster.

Addons.description: The add-ons to be installed for the cluster.

ClusterSpec.description:
The managed cluster spec. Value:
ack.pro.small: Professional hosting cluster, namely: "ACK Pro version cluster".
ack.standard: Standard hosting cluster.
Default value: ack.pro.small.

DeleteOptions.description: Delete options, only work for deleting resource.

DeletionProtection.description:
Specifies whether to enable deletion protection for the cluster. 
After deletion protection is enabled, the cluster cannot be deleted 
in the ACK console or by calling API operations. Valid values:true: enables deletion protection for the cluster.
false: disables deletion protection for the cluster.
Default value: false.

EncryptionProviderKey.description: The ID of the key that is managed by Key Management Service (KMS). This key is used to encrypt data disks.You can use KMS in only professional managed Kubernetes clusters.

EndpointPublicAccess.description:
Whether to enable the public network API Server:
true: which means that the public network API Server is open.
false: If set to false, the API server on the public network will not be created, only the API server on the private network will be created.Default value: true.

IpStack.description: The IP stack of the cluster. Value: ipv4 (Single stack) or ipv6 (Dual Stack). Default value: ipv4

KubernetesVersion.description: The version of the Kubernetes cluster.

Name.description: The name of the cluster. The cluster name can use uppercase and lowercase letters, Chinese characters, numbers, and dashes.

PrivateZone.description: Whether to enable PrivateZone for service discovery.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of resource group.

SecurityGroupId.description: Specifies the ID of the security group to which the cluster ECS instance belongs.

ServiceCidr.description: The service network segment cannot conflict with the VPC network segment and the container network segment. When the system is selected to automatically create a VPC, the network segment 172.19.0.0/20 is used by default.

ServiceDiscoveryTypes.description:
Intra-cluster service discovery type,
used to specify the service discovery method in the ASK cluster.
CoreDNS: To use Kubernetes native standard service discovery component CoreDNS,
a set of containers needs to be deployed in the cluster for DNS resolution.
By default, two ECI instances with a size of 0.25 Core and 512 MiB are used.
PrivateZone: To use Alibaba Cloud PrivateZone products to provide service discovery capabilities,
the PrivateZone service needs to be enabled.
Default value: off

SnatEntry.description:
Whether to configure SNAT for the network.
When a VPC can access the public network environment, set it to false.
When an existing VPC cannot access the public network environment:
When set to True, SNAT is configured and the public network environment can be accessed at this time.
If set to false, it means that SNAT is not configured and the public network environment cannot be accessed at this time.
Default to true.

Tags.description: Tag the cluster.

TimeZone.description: The time zone used by the cluster..

VSwitchIds.description:
The IDs of VSwitches. If you leave this property empty, the system automatically creates a VSwitch.
Note You must specify both the VpcId and VSwitchIds or leave both of them empty.

VpcId.description: VPC ID.

ZoneId.description: The zone ID.

APIServerSLBId.description: The id of API server SLB

DefaultUserKubeConfig.description: Default user kubernetes config which is used for configuring cluster credentials.

PrivateUserKubConfig.description: Private user kubernetes config which is used for configuring cluster credentials.

ScalingGroupId.description: Scaling group id

TaskId.description: Task ID. Automatically assigned by the system, the user queries the task status.

ALIYUN::CS::AnyCluster.description: ALIYUN::CS::AnyCluster is used to create a Container Service for Kubernetes (ACK) cluster of a specific type.

APIServerSLBId.description: The id of API server SLB

DefaultUserKubeConfig.description: Default user kubernetes config which is used for configuring cluster credentials.

PrivateUserKubConfig.description: Private user kubernetes config which is used for configuring cluster credentials.

ScalingGroupId.description: Scaling group id

TaskId.description: Task ID. Automatically assigned by the system, the user queries the task status.

ALIYUN::CS::ApplicationDeployment.description: ALIYUN::CS::ApplicationDeployment is used to deploy an application.

ChartUrl.description: Helm chart package URL, must be a valid URL.

ClusterId.description: The cluster id of the deployed application.

Name.description: Name of the deployed application.

Type.description: Type of the deployed application, currently can only be helm.

Values.description: Helm deployment parameters, a map that will be converted to YAML text.

TaskId.description: The task ID of the application deployment.

ALIYUN::CS::ClusterAddons.description: ALIYUN::CS::ClusterAddons is used to install components in a cluster.

Addons.description:
A combination of addon plugins for Kubernetes clusters.
Network plug-in: including Flannel and Terway network plug-ins
Log service: Optional. If the log service is not enabled, the cluster audit function cannot be used.
Ingress: The installation of the Ingress component is enabled by default.

InstalledIgnore.description:
Whether to ignore already installed addons when creating. If true, when creating, only install addons that are not yet installed. When deleting, only uninstall addons that are installed during the creation stage.
Default false.

RolePolicy.description:
Before deploying the application, check the policies associated with the roles of the current user. Valid values:
- EnsureAdminRoleAndBinding: Automatically create a role named "ros:application-admin:${user-id}" with administrator permissions and bind it to the current user.
- None: Do nothing.
The default value is EnsureAdminRoleAndBinding.

ValidationMode.description:
Validation modes include:
- Basic: basic validation, such as verifying the existence of a cluster.
- Strict: in addition to basic validation, also validate the legality of WaitUntil.

WaitUntil.description: After starting a creation or update, wait until all conditions are met.

WaitUntilData.description: A list of values for each JsonPath in WaitUntil.

ALIYUN::CS::ClusterApplication.description: The ALIYUN::CS::ClusterApplication resource type deploys containerized applications.

ClusterId.description: The ID of the kubernetes cluster.

CreationMode.description:
Creation modes include:
- Normal: create new resources, will report error if already exists.
- Apply: similar to kubectl apply, create if not exists, update if exists. During the deletion phase, ROS will delete newly created application, but updated existing application will not be deleted.

DefaultNamespace.description:
The default namespace for the application, default value is default.
If a namespace is defined in yaml metadata, its priority is higher than DefaultNamespace.
If the DefaultNamespace does not exist, ROS will create it automatically and keep it by default during the delete phase.

DefaultNamespaceDeletion.description: Whether to delete the namespace specified by DefaultNamespace. If DefaultNamespace is in ('default', 'kube-node-lease', 'kube-public', 'kube-system', 'arms-prom'), no matter whether DefaultNamespaceDeletion is true or not, it will not be deleted.

RolePolicy.description:
Before deploying the application, check the policies associated with the roles of the current user. Valid values:
- EnsureAdminRoleAndBinding: Automatically create a role named "ros:application-admin:${user-id}" with administrator permissions and bind it to the current user.
- None: Do nothing.
The default value is EnsureAdminRoleAndBinding.

Stage.description:
At what stage to run. Valid values:
- All: all stages, including create, update, and delete.
- Delete: the delete stage. This means that only in the deletion stage of this resource will apply yaml to the cluster.
The default is All.

ValidationMode.description:
Validation modes include:
- Basic: basic validation, such as verifying the existence of a cluster.
- Strict: in addition to basic validation, also validate the legality of YamlContent and WaitUntil.

WaitUntil.description: After starting a creation or update, wait until all conditions are met.

WaitUntilData.description: A list of values for each JsonPath in WaitUntil.

ALIYUN::CS::ClusterHelmApplication.description: The ALIYUN::CS::ClusterHelmApplication type is used to deploy an application using Helm.

ChartUrl.description: The URL of chart. Supports HTTP or HTTPS.

ClusterId.description: The ID of the kubernetes cluster.

Credential.description: The credential of ACR repo. Only take effects when ChartUrl is the address of ACR repo.

IgnoreExisting.description:
How to ignore existing helm application:
Disabled(default): If a helm application with the same name exists, an error will be reported when creating it.
SkipInstallIfExisting: If there is a helm application with the same name, the helm application creation process will be ignored.
SkipAllOperationsIfExisting: If there is a helm application with the same name, the helm application creation process will be ignored. If the helm application is not created by this resource, it will be ignored during update and delete stage.

Name.description: The name for helm release.

Namespace.description:
Namespace to use with helm. Default is default.
If the Namespace does not exist, ROS will automatically create it and delete it during the deletion phase.

NamespaceDeletion.description: Whether to delete the namespace specified. If Namespace is in ('default', 'kube-node-lease', 'kube-public', 'kube-system', 'arms-prom'), no matter whether NamespaceDeletion is true or not, it will not be deleted.

RolePolicy.description:
Before deploying the application, check the policies associated with the roles of the current user. Valid values:
- EnsureAdminRoleAndBinding: Automatically create a role named "ros:application-admin:${user-id}" with administrator permissions and bind it to the current user.
- None: Do nothing.
The default value is EnsureAdminRoleAndBinding.

ValidationMode.description:
Validation modes include:
- Basic: basic validation, such as verifying the existence of a cluster.
- Strict: in addition to basic validation, also validate the legality of WaitUntil.

WaitUntil.description: After starting a creation or update, wait until all conditions are met.

WaitUntilData.description: A list of values for each JsonPath in WaitUntil.

ALIYUN::CS::ClusterNodePool.description: The ALIYUN::CS::ClusterNodePool resource type creates a node pool for a cluster.

Count.description: The number of nodes in the node pool.

KubernetesConfig.description: The configurations of the ACK cluster.

Management.description: The configurations of the managed node pool.

NodePoolInfo.description: The configurations of the node pool.

ScalingGroup.description: The configurations of the scaling group used by the node pool.

ALIYUN::CS::GrantPermissions.description: ALIYUN::CS::GrantPermissions is used to grant role-based access control (RBAC) permissions to a Resource Access Management (RAM) user or RAM role.

Permissions.description: The permissions that you want to grant to the RAM user.

UserId.description: The ID of the RAM user.

ALIYUN::CS::ManagedEdgeKubernetesCluster.description: Use ALIYUN::CS::ManagedEdgeKubernetesCluster to create an ACK managed edge Kubernetes cluster.

Addons.description: The add-ons to be installed for the cluster.

CloudMonitorFlags.description:
Whether to install the cloud monitoring plugin:
true: indicates installation
false: Do not install
Default to false

ClusterSpec.description:
The edge managed cluster spec. Value:
ack.pro.small: Professional hosting cluster, namely: "ACK Pro version cluster".
ack.standard: Standard hosting cluster.
Default value: ack.standard. The value can be empty. When it is empty, a standard managed cluster will be created.

ContainerCidr.description: The container network segment cannot conflict with the VPC network segment. When the system is selected to automatically create a VPC, the network segment 172.16.0.0/16 is used by default.

DeletionProtection.description:
Specifies whether to enable deletion protection for the cluster. 
After deletion protection is enabled, the cluster cannot be deleted 
in the ACK console or by calling API operations. Valid values:true: enables deletion protection for the cluster.
false: disables deletion protection for the cluster.
Default value: false.

EncryptionProviderKey.description: The ID of the key that is managed by Key Management Service (KMS). This key is used to encrypt data disks.You can use KMS in only professional managed Kubernetes clusters.

EndpointPublicAccess.description:
Whether to enable the public network API Server:
true: which means that the public network API Server is open.
false: If set to false, the API server on the public network will not be created, only the API server on the private network will be created.Default to true.

IpStack.description: The IP stack of the cluster. Value: ipv4 (Single stack) or ipv6 (Dual Stack). Default value: ipv4

IsEnterpriseSecurityGroup.description:
Specifies whether to create an advanced security group. 
This parameter takes effect only if security_group_id is left empty.
Note You must specify an advanced security group for a cluster that has Terway installed.
true: creates an advanced security group.
false: does not create an advanced security group.
Default value: false.

KeyPair.description: Key pair name. Specify one of KeyPair or LoginPassword.

KubernetesVersion.description: The version of the Kubernetes cluster.

LoginPassword.description: SSH login password. Password rules are 8-30 characters and contain three items (upper and lower case letters, numbers, and special symbols). Specify one of KeyPair or LoginPassword.

Name.description: The name of the cluster. The cluster name can use uppercase and lowercase letters, Chinese characters, numbers, and dashes.

NodeCidrMask.description:
The maximum number of IP addresses that can be assigned to nodes. 
This number is determined by the specified pod CIDR block. 
This parameter takes effect only if the cluster uses the Flannel plug-in.Default value: 25.

Profile.description: Edge cluster ID. The default value is Edge.

ProxyMode.description: kube-proxy proxy mode, supports both iptables and ipvs modes. The default is iptables.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of resource group.

ServiceCidr.description: The service network segment cannot conflict with the VPC network segment and the container network segment. When the system is selected to automatically create a VPC, the network segment 172.19.0.0/20 is used by default.

SnatEntry.description:
Whether to configure SNAT for the network.
When a VPC can access the public network environment, set it to false.
When an existing VPC cannot access the public network environment:
When set to True, SNAT is configured and the public network environment can be accessed at this time.
If set to false, it means that SNAT is not configured and the public network environment cannot be accessed at this time.
Default to true.

Tags.description: Tag the cluster.

TimeoutMins.description: Cluster resource stack creation timeout, in minutes. The default value is 60.

VSwitchIds.description: The virtual switch ID of the worker node.

VpcId.description:
VPC ID. If not set, the system will automatically create a VPC, and the VPC network segment created by the system is 192.168.0.0/16. 
VpcId and VSwitchId can only be empty at the same time or set the corresponding values at the same time.

ZoneIds.description: Zone ids of worker node virtual switches belongs to.

APIServerSLBId.description: The id of API server SLB

DefaultUserKubeConfig.description: Default user kubernetes config which is used for configuring cluster credentials.

PrivateUserKubConfig.description: Private user kubernetes config which is used for configuring cluster credentials.

ScalingGroupId.description: Scaling group id

TaskId.description: Task ID. Automatically assigned by the system, the user queries the task status.

ALIYUN::CS::ManagedKubernetesCluster.description: The ALIYUN::CS::ManagedKubernetesCluster type creates ACK managed clusters.

Addons.description:
A combination of addon plugins for Kubernetes clusters.
Network plug-in: including Flannel and Terway network plug-ins
Log service: Optional. If the log service is not enabled, the cluster audit function cannot be used.
Ingress: The installation of the Ingress component is enabled by default.

CloudMonitorFlags.description:
Whether to install the cloud monitoring plugin:
true: indicates installation
false: Do not install
Default to false

ClusterSpec.description:
The managed cluster spec. Value:
ack.pro.small: Professional hosting cluster, namely: "ACK Pro version cluster".
ack.standard: Standard hosting cluster.
Default value: ack.standard. The value can be empty. When it is empty, a standard managed cluster will be created.

ContainerCidr.description: The container network segment cannot conflict with the VPC network segment. When the system is selected to automatically create a VPC, the network segment 172.16.0.0/16 is used by default.

ControlPlaneLogComponents.description: List of target components for which logs need to be collected. Supports apiserver, kcm, scheduler, ccm, controlplane-events, ack-goatscaler, coredns, cluster-autoscaler, kuberay-operator, gatekepper, vk, istio, cluster-operator, application-controller.

ControlPlaneLogProject.description: Control plane log project. If this field is not set, a log service project named k8s-log-{ClusterID} will be automatically created.

ControlPlaneLogTtl.description: Control plane log retention duration (unit: day). Default 30.

DeleteOptions.description: Delete options, only work for deleting resource.

DeletionProtection.description:
Specifies whether to enable deletion protection for the cluster. 
After deletion protection is enabled, the cluster cannot be deleted 
in the ACK console or by calling API operations. Valid values:true: enables deletion protection for the cluster.
false: disables deletion protection for the cluster.
Default value: false.

EncryptionProviderKey.description: The ID of the key that is managed by Key Management Service (KMS). This key is used to encrypt data disks.You can use KMS in only professional managed Kubernetes clusters.

EndpointPublicAccess.description:
Whether to enable the public network API Server:
true: which means that the public network API Server is open.
false: If set to false, the API server on the public network will not be created, only the API server on the private network will be created.Default to false.

FormatDisk.description:
Specifies whether to mount a data disk to nodes that are created 
on existing Elastic Compute Service (ECS) instances. Valid values:
true: stores the data of containers and images on a data disk. 
The original data on the disk will be overwritten. 
Back up data before you mount the disk.
false: does not store the data of containers and images on a data disk.
Default value: false.
How to mount a data disk:
If the ECS instances have data disks mounted and the file system of the last 
data disk is not initialized, the system automatically formats the data disk to ext4. 
Then, the system mounts the data disk to /var/lib/docker and /var/lib/kubelet.
The system does not create or mount a new data disk if no data disk has been 
mounted to the ECS instances.

IpStack.description: The IP stack of the cluster. Value: ipv4 (Single stack) or ipv6 (Dual Stack). Default value: ipv4

IsEnterpriseSecurityGroup.description:
Specifies whether to create an advanced security group. 
This parameter takes effect only if security_group_id is left empty.
Note You must specify an advanced security group for a cluster that has Terway installed.
true: creates an advanced security group.
false: does not create an advanced security group.
Default value: false.

KeepInstanceName.description:
Specifies whether to retain the names of existing ECS instances that are used in the cluster.
true: retains the names.
false: does not retain the names. The new names are assigned by the system.
Default value: true.

KeyPair.description: Key pair name. Specify one of KeyPair or LoginPassword.

KubernetesVersion.description: The version of the Kubernetes cluster.

LoadBalancerSpec.description: The specification of the Server Load Balancer instance. Allowed value: slb.s1.small|slb.s2.small|slb.s2.medium|slb.s3.small|slb.s3.medium|slb.s3.large

LoginPassword.description: SSH login password. Password rules are 8-30 characters and contain three items (upper and lower case letters, numbers, and special symbols). Specify one of KeyPair or LoginPassword.

Name.description: The name of the cluster. The cluster name can use uppercase and lowercase letters, Chinese characters, numbers, and dashes.

NodeCidrMask.description:
The maximum number of IP addresses that can be assigned to nodes. 
This number is determined by the specified pod CIDR block. 
This parameter takes effect only if the cluster uses the Flannel plug-in.Default value: 25.

NodeNameMode.description:
A custom node name consists of a prefix, an IP substring, and a suffix. The format iscustomized,{prefix},{ip_substring},{suffix}, for example: customized,aliyun.com,5,test.
- The prefix and suffix can contain one or more parts that are separated by periods (.). Each part can contain lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens (-). The node name must start and end with a lowercase letter or digit.
- The IP substring length specifies the number of digits to be truncated from the end of the node IP address. Valid values: 5 to 12. For example, if the node IP address is 192.168.0.55, the prefix is aliyun.com, the IP substring length is 5, and the suffix is test, the node name will be aliyun.com00055test.

OsType.description:
The type of operating system. Valid values:
Windows
Linux
Default value: Linux.

Platform.description:
The release version of the operating system. Valid values:
CentOS
AliyunLinux
QbootAliyunLinux
Qboot
Windows
WindowsCore
Default value: CentOS.

PodVswitchIds.description:
The list of pod vSwitches. For each vSwitch that is allocated to nodes, 
 you must specify at least one pod vSwitch in the same zone. 
 The pod vSwitches cannot be the same as the node vSwitches. 
 We recommend that you set the mask length of the CIDR block to a value no 
greater than 19 for the pod vSwitches.
The pod_vswitch_ids parameter is required when the Terway network 
plug-in is selected for the cluster.

ProxyMode.description: kube-proxy proxy mode, supports both iptables and ipvs modes. The default is iptables.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of resource group.

Runtime.description: The container runtime of the cluster. The default runtime is Docker.

SecurityGroupId.description: Specifies the ID of the security group to which the cluster ECS instance belongs.

SecurityHardeningOs.description:
Alibaba Cloud OS security hardening. Value:
true: enables security hardening OS.
false: disables security hardening OS.
Default value: false.

ServiceCidr.description: The service network segment cannot conflict with the VPC network segment and the container network segment. When the system is selected to automatically create a VPC, the network segment 172.19.0.0/20 is used by default.

SnatEntry.description:
Whether to configure SNAT for the network.
When a VPC can access the public network environment, set it to false.
When an existing VPC cannot access the public network environment:
When set to True, SNAT is configured and the public network environment can be accessed at this time.
If set to false, it means that SNAT is not configured and the public network environment cannot be accessed at this time.
Default to true.

SocEnabled.description:
Valid values:
true: enables reinforcement based on classified protection.
false: disables reinforcement based on classified protection.
Default value: false.

Tags.description: Tag the cluster.

Taint.description: It is used to mark nodes with taints. It is usually used for the scheduling strategy of Pods. The corresponding concept is: tolerance. If there is a corresponding tolerance mark on the Pods, the stain on the node can be tolerated and scheduled to the node.

TimeZone.description: The time zone of the cluster.

TimeoutMins.description: Cluster resource stack creation timeout, in minutes. The default value is 60.

UserData.description: The user-defined data. [1, 16KB] characters.User data should not be base64 encoded. If you want to pass base64 encoded string to the property, use function Fn::Base64Decode to decode the base64 string first.

VSwitchIds.description: The virtual switch ID of the worker node.

VpcId.description: VPC ID.

ZoneIds.description: Zone ids of worker node virtual switches belongs to.

APIServerSLBId.description: The id of API server SLB

DefaultUserKubeConfig.description: Default user kubernetes config which is used for configuring cluster credentials.

PrivateUserKubConfig.description: Private user kubernetes config which is used for configuring cluster credentials.

ScalingGroupId.description: Scaling group id

TaskId.description: Task ID. Automatically assigned by the system, the user queries the task status.

AutoRenew.description: 是否开启自动续费，可选值：true（开启）false（不开启）默认值：false。

AutoRenewPeriod.description: 自动续费周期，单位为月，可选值：123612

InstanceType.description: 实例规格

PaymentType.description: 付费类型：- Subscription：包年包月- PayAsYouGo：按量付费<note>按量付费实例无到期时间</note>

Period.description: 付费周期，PayType（付费类型）为Subscription时为必选参数，单位为月，可选值：1-9，12，24，36 。

PeriodUnit.description: 指定预付费实例为包年或者包月类型，取值：Year：包年；Month：包月。

VpcId.description: 用户VpcId

ZoneId.description: 可用区id

AutoRenew.description: 是否开启自动续费，可选值：true（开启）false（不开启）默认值：false。

AutoRenewPeriod.description: 自动续费周期，单位为月，可选值：123612

InstanceType.description: 实例规格

LockMode.description:
锁定模式。可取值：

- None：未锁定
- Expired：集群订阅到期锁定
- DiskFull：磁盘已满锁定

PaymentType.description: 付费类型：- Subscription：包年包月- PayAsYouGo：按量付费<note>按量付费实例无到期时间</note>

Period.description: 付费周期，PayType（付费类型）为Subscription时为必选参数，单位为月，可选值：1-9，12，24，36 。

PeriodUnit.description: 指定预付费实例为包年或者包月类型，取值：Year：包年；Month：包月。

VpcId.description: 用户VpcId

ZoneId.description: 可用区id

ALIYUN::ClickHouse::DBCluster.description: ALIYUN::ClickHouse::DBCluster is used to create an ApsaraDB for ClickHouse cluster.

Category.description:
The edition of the cluster. Valid values:
Basic: Single-replica Edition
HighAvailability: Double-replica Edition

DBClusterNetworkType.description: Network type of the cluster instance, value: VPC

DBClusterType.description:
The specification of the cluster.
If the cluster is of the Single-replica Edition, the following values are valid:
S4: 4 cores, 16 GB.
S8: 8 cores, 32 GB.
S16: 16 cores, 64 GB.
S32: 32 cores, 128 GB.
S64: 64 cores, 256 GB.
S104: 104 cores, 384 GB.
If the cluster is of the Double-replica Edition, the following values are valid:
C4: 4 cores, 16 GB.
C8: 8 cores, 32 GB.
C16: 16 cores, 64 GB.
C32: 32 cores, 128 GB.
C64: 64 cores, 256 GB.
C104: 104 cores, 384 GB.

DBNodeCount.description:
The number of nodes.
If the cluster is of the Single-replica Edition, the value ranges from 1 to 48.
If the cluster is of the Double-replica Edition, the value ranges from 1 to 24.

DBNodeStorage.description:
The storage capacity of a single node. Valid values: 100 to 32000. Unit: GB.
Note self value is a multiple of 100.

DbNodeStorageType.description: Instance node storage type. Valid values:  cloud_essd, cloud_efficiency.

EncryptionType.description: Kms key type, only cloud disk encryption is supported and the value is CloudDisk.

PaymentType.description:
The billing method of the cluster. Valid values:
Postpaid: pay-as-you-go
Prepaid: subscription

Period.description: The unit of the subscription duration.

UsedTime.description:
The subscription duration. Valid values:
When Period is Month, it could be from 1 to 9, 12, 24, 36.
 When Period is Year, it could be from 1 to 3.

VSwitchId.description: VSwitchId

VpcId.description: VpcId

ZoneId.description: ZoneId

Category.description: The edition of the cluster.

DBClusterId.description: The id of DBCluster

DBClusterNetworkType.description: Network type of the cluster instance, value: VPC

DBNodeStorage.description: The storage capacity of a single node.

DbNodeStorageType.description: Instance node storage type. Valid values:  cloud_essd, cloud_efficiency.

EncryptionType.description: Kms key type, only cloud disk encryption is supported and the value is CloudDisk.

Engine.description: Engine

EngineVersion.description: EngineVersion

PaymentType.description: PayType

Period.description: Prepaid time period.If the payment type is Prepaid, this parameter is mandatory. Specify the prepaid cluster as a yearly or monthly type. Valid values:  Year, Month.

Port.description: Connection port

VSwitchId.description: VSwitchId

VpcId.description: VpcId

ZoneId.description: ZoneId

BackupSetId.description: The ID of the backup set.

DBInstanceDescription.description: The description of the database instance.

DBTimeZone.description: The time zone of the database.

Engine.description: The engine type.

NodeScaleMax.description: The maximum number of nodes for scaling.

NodeScaleMin.description: The minimum number of nodes for scaling.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of the resource group.

SourceDBInstanceId.description: The ID of the source database instance.

Tags.description: Tags to attach to clickhouse_enterprise_db. Max support 20 tags to add during create clickhouse_enterprise_db. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

VSwitchId.description: The ID of the VSwitch.

VpcId.description: The ID of the VPC.

ZoneId.description: The ID of the zone.

DBInstanceId.description: The ID of the database instance.

ALIYUN::ClickHouse::SynDb.description: ALIYUN::ClickHouse::SynDb is used to create a synchronization task for an ApsaraDB for ClickHouse Community-compatible Edition cluster.

CkPassword.description: The password of the database account

CkUserName.description: The account of the clickhouse database.

LimitUpper.description: The maximum number of rows to sync per second.

RdsPassword.description: The password of the RDS database account.

RdsUserName.description: The account of the RDS database.

RdsVpcUrl.description: Intranet address of ApsaraDB for RDS.

ALIYUN::CloudPhone::Image.description: ALIYUN::CloudPhone::Image is used to create a custom image for a cloud phone.

Description.description: The image description. The description must be 2 to 256 characters in length. It cannot start with http:// or https://.

ImageName.description: The image name. The name must be 2 to 128 characters in length. It can contain letters, digits, colons (:), underscores (_), and hyphens (-). The name must start with a letter but cannot start with http:// or https://.

InstanceId.description: The ID of the mobile phone instance.

CreateTime.description: The time when the image was created. The time follows the ISO 8601 standard.

Description.description: The image description.

IsSelfShared.description: Indicates whether the image is shared with other Alibaba Cloud accounts.

OsName.description: The display name of the OS in Chinese.

OsNameEn.description: The display name of the OS in English.

Usage.description: Whether the image is already running in the cloud phone instance.

ALIYUN::CloudPhone::InstanceGroup.description: ALIYUN::CloudPhone::InstanceGroup is used to create and start cloud phones.

Amount.description:
Specifies the number of ECS instances to create.Value range: 1~100
Default：1

AutoPay.description: Whether to pay automatically, the default is true

AutoRenew.description:
Whether renew the fee automatically. 
When the parameter InstanceChargeType is PrePaid, it will take effect. 
Range of value:True: automatic renewal. 
False: no automatic renewal. Default value is False.

ChargeType.description: Instance internet access charge type.

Description.description:
Description of instance. 
The length is 2~256 English or Chinese characters and cannot start with http:// and https://.

EipBandwidth.description:
EIP bandwidth value, the value range is 1-200. 
Setting this parameter will automatically create an EIP instance 
corresponding to the bandwidth and bind the EIP instance to the 
cloud phone instance. When the instance is released, this EIP 
instance will be released and recycled together.

InstanceName.description:
"Display name of the instance, [2, 128] English or Chinese characters, must 
start with a letter or Chinese in size, can contain numbers, "_" or ".", "-"

InstanceType.description: instance type

KeyPairName.description:
Cloud phone instance key pair name. 
The cloud phone key can be imported through the ImportKeyPair interface.

Period.description:
Prepaid time period. While PeriodUnit is month, it could be 1, 2, 3, 6.
While PeriodUnit is year, it could be from 1 to 5Default value is 1.

PeriodUnit.description: Unit of prepaid time period, it could be Month/Year. Default value is Month.

Resolution.description:
You can use the DescribeInstanceTypes interface to query the list of 
resolutions supported by the current specification and select an appropriate resolution.

SecurityGroupId.description: Security group to create ecs instance. For classic instance need the security group not belong to VPC, for VPC instance, please make sure the security group belong to specified VPC.
