Tag.description: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

VSwitchId.description: vswitch id

VncPassword.description:
Cloud phone VNC password.
The password must be six characters long, and must contain only uppercase, 
lowercase English letters and Arabic numerals.

InstanceIds.description: instance ids

PrivateIps.description: Private IP address list of created cloud phone instances. Only for VPC instance.

ALIYUN::CloudPhone::KeyPair.description: ALIYUN::CloudPhone::KeyPair is used to import the public key of a Rivest-Shamir-Adleman (RSA)-encrypted key pair that is generated by a third-party tool.

KeyPairName.description: The name of the key pair. The name must be globally unique. The name must be 2 to 128 characters in length. The name must start with a letter but cannot start with http:// or https://. The name can contain letters, digits, colons (:), underscores (_), and hyphens (-).

PublicKeyBody.description: The public key content of the key pair.

CreateTime.description: The creation time of the resource.

KeyPairFingerPrint.description: The fingerprint of the key pair. The message-digest algorithm 5 (MD5) is used based on the public key fingerprint format defined in RFC 4716.

KeyPairName.description: The name of the key pair.

ALIYUN::CloudPhone::RunCommand.description: ALIYUN::CloudPhone::RunCommand is used to run a command on cloud phones.

Command.description:
The command to be executed.
The maximum length of a command is 1024 bytes, and only supports lowercase letters, numbers, downline (_), points (.), Slanting (/), colon (:), medium line (-).

InstanceIds.description:
ID of the instance executing the command.
Range of n: 1 ~ 10

RunAgainOn.description: The stage of executing the command again.

ALIYUN::CloudSSO::AccessAssignment.description: ALIYUN::CloudSSO::AccessAssignment is used to assign access permissions on an account in your resource directory to a user or group by using an access configuration.

AccessConfigurationId.description: The ID of the access configuration.

PrincipalId.description:
The ID of the CloudSSO identity.
- If you set PrincipalType to User, set PrincipalId to the ID of the CloudSSO user.
- If you set PrincipalType to Group, set PrincipalId to the ID of the CloudSSO group.

PrincipalType.description: The type of the CloudSSO identity. Valid values: User, Group

TargetId.description: The ID of the task object.

TargetType.description: The type of the task object. Set the value to RD-Account, which specifies the accounts in the resource directory.

ALIYUN::CloudSSO::AccessConfiguration.description: ALIYUN::CloudSSO::AccessConfiguration is used to create an access configuration.

AccessConfigurationName.description:
The name of the access configuration.
The name can contain letters, digits, and hyphens (-).
The name can be up to 32 characters in length.

Description.description:
The description of the access configuration.
The description can be up to 1,024 characters in length.

RelayState.description:
The initial web page that is displayed after a CloudSSO user accesses an account in your resource directory by using the access configuration.
The web page must be a page of the Alibaba Cloud Management Console. By default, this parameter is empty, which indicates that the initial web page is the homepage of the Alibaba Cloud Management Console.

SessionDuration.description:
The duration of a session in which a CloudSSO user accesses an account in your resource directory by using the access configuration.
Unit: seconds.
Valid values: 900 to 43200. The value 900 indicates 15 minutes. The value 43200 indicates 12 hours.
Default value: 3600. The value indicates 1 hour.

AccessConfigurationId.description: The ID of the access configuration.

ALIYUN::CloudSSO::AccessConfigurationPro.description: ALIYUN::CloudSSO::AccessConfigurationProvision is used to provision an access configuration for an account in your resource directory.

AccessConfigurationId.description: The ID of the access configuration.

TargetId.description: The ID of the task object.

TargetType.description: The type of the task object. Set the value to RD-Account, which specifies the accounts in the resource directory.

ALIYUN::CloudSSO::Directory.description: ALIYUN::CloudSSO::Directory is used to create a directory.

DirectoryName.description:
The name of the directory. The name must be globally unique.
The name can contain lowercase letters, digits, or hyphens (-). The name cannot start or end with a hyphen (-) and cannot contain two consecutive hyphens (-). The name cannot start with d-.
The name must be 2 to 64 characters in length.
**Note**: If you do not specify this parameter, the value of this parameter is automatically generated by the system.

ALIYUN::CloudSSO::Group.description: ALIYUN::CloudSSO::Group is used to create a group in CloudSSO.

Description.description:
The description of the group.
The description can be up to 1,024 characters in length.

GroupName.description:
The name of the group.
The name can contain letters, digits, underscores (_), hyphens (-), and periods (.).
The name can be up to 128 characters in length.

ALIYUN::CloudSSO::PermissionPolicyToAcce.description: ALIYUN::CloudSSO::PermissionPolicyToAccessConfigurationAddition is used to add a policy to an access configuration.

AccessConfigurationId.description: The ID of the access configuration.

InlinePolicyDocument.description:
The configurations of the inline policy.
The value can be up to 4,096 characters in length.
If you set PermissionPolicyType to Inline, you must specify this parameter.

PermissionPolicyName.description:
The name of the permission policy.
- If you set PermissionPolicyType to System, you must set this parameter to the name of the system policy. You can obtain the name of the system policy from RAM.
- If you set PermissionPolicyType to Inline, you must set this parameter to the name of the inline policy. A custom value is supported.

PermissionPolicyType.description:
The type of the permission policy. Valid values:
- System: system policy. Resource Access Management (RAM) system policies are reused.
- Inline: inline policy. Inline policies are created based on the RAM policy syntax and structure.

ALIYUN::CloudSSO::SAMLIdentityProvider.description: ALIYUN::CloudSSO::SAMLIdentityProvider is used to configure the information about a Security Assertion Markup Language (SAML) identity provider (IdP).

EncodedMetadataDocument.description:
The metadata file of the IdP. The value of this parameter is Base64-encoded.
The file is provided by the IdP that supports SAML 2.0.

EntityId.description: The entity ID of the IdP.

LoginUrl.description: The logon URL of the IdP.

SSOStatus.description:
The status of SSO logon. Valid values:
- Enabled
- Disabled (default)

WantRequestSigned.description:
Specifies whether CloudSSO needs to sign SAML requests. The requests are sent when users log on to the CloudSSO user portal to initiate SAML-based SSO. Valid values:
- true: yes
- false: no (default)

X509Certificate.description: The X.509 certificate n the PEM format. If you specify this parameter, all existing certificates are replaced.

ALIYUN::CloudSSO::SCIMServerCredential.description: ALIYUN::CloudSSO::SCIMServerCredential is used to create a System for Cross-domain Identity Management (SCIM) credential.

Status.description:
The new status of the SCIM credential. Valid values:
- Enabled: The SCIM credential is enabled.
- Disabled: The SCIM credential is disabled.
The default value is Enabled.

CredentialId.description: The ID of the SCIM credential.

CredentialSecret.description: The secret of the SCIM credential.

ALIYUN::CloudSSO::SCIMSynchronization.description: ALIYUN::CloudSSO::SCIMSynchronization is used to enable or disable System for Cross-domain Identity Management (SCIM) synchronization.

SCIMSynchronizationStatus.description:
The status of SCIM synchronization. Valid values:
- Enabled
- Disabled
The default value is Enabled.

ALIYUN::CloudSSO::User.description: ALIYUN::CloudSSO::User is used to create a user.

Description.description:
The description of the user.
The description can be up to 1,024 characters in length.

DisplayName.description:
The display name of the user.
The name can be up to 256 characters in length.

Email.description:
The email address of the user. The email address must be unique within the directory.
The email address can be up to 128 characters in length.

FirstName.description:
The first name of the user.
The name can be up to 64 characters in length.

LastName.description:
The last name of the user.
The name can be up to 64 characters in length.

Status.description:
The status of the user. Valid values:
- Enabled: The logon of the user is enabled. This is the default value.
- Disabled: The logon of the user is disabled.

UserName.description:
The name of the user. The name must be unique within the directory. The name cannot be changed.
The name can contain numbers, letters, and the following special characters: @_-.
The name can be up to 64 characters in length.

ALIYUN::CloudSSO::UserProvision.description: ALIYUN::CloudSSO::UserProvision is used to create a Resource Access Management (RAM) user provisioning.

DeletionStrategy.description:
Delete policy. The treatment strategy for the synchronized RAM users when the RAM user synchronization is removed. Valid values:
- Delete: Delete When the RAM user synchronization is removed, the RAM users that have been synchronized to the RAM from the cloud SSO are deleted.
- Keep: When the RAM user synchronization is removed, the RAM users that have been synchronized to the RAM from the cloud SSO are retained.

Description.description: The description of the user.

DuplicationStrategy.description:
Conflict policy. When the cloud SSO user is synchronized to the RAM, the processing strategy if there is a user with the same name in the RAM. Valid values:
- KeepBoth: Keep both of them. When the cloud SSO user is synchronized to RAM, if the RAM already has a user with the same name, it will try to create a RAM user with the user name after adding the suffix _sso to the user name of the cloud SSO user.
- TakeOver: Take over. When the cloud SSO user is synchronized to the RAM, if the RAM already has a user with the same name, the existing RAM user is directly replaced by the cloud SSO synchronization user.

PrincipalId.description:
The ID of the principal. Valid values:
- When the PrincipalType value is Group, the value is the cloud SSO user group ID (g-********).
- When PrincipalType takes the value User, this value is the cloud SSO user ID (u-********).

PrincipalType.description:
The type of the principal. Valid values:
- User: The principal is a cloud SSO user.
- Group: The principal is a cloud SSO group.

TargetId.description: Target ID for RAM user synchronization. Currently, it is the RD account ID.

TargetType.description: Target type for RAM user synchronization. Currently, it is RD-Account.

UserProvisionId.description: The ID of the user provisioning.

ALIYUN::CloudSSO::UserToGroupAddition.description: ALIYUN::CloudSSO::UserToGroupAddition is used to add a user to a group.

ALIYUN::CloudSiem::ImportLogTasksSubmiss.description: ALIYUN::CloudSiem::ImportLogTasksSubmission is used to import and submit a log collection task.

Accounts.description: The list of accounts to be submitted.

CloudCode.description: The cloud code. The code that is used for multi-cloud environments. Valid values: qcloud for Tencent Cloud, aliyun for Alibaba Cloud, hcloud for Huawei Cloud

LogCodes.description: The list of log codes to be submitted. For all available log codes of a product, query the Cloud Siem ListImportedLogsByProd API with a specific product code.

ProdCode.description: The product code. For all available product codes, query the Cloud Siem ListAllProds API.

ALIYUN::CloudSiem::UserSourceLogConfig.description: ALIYUN::CloudSiem::UserSourceLogConfig is used to add logs of a cloud service within an account.

SourceLogCode.description: The source log code. For all available log codes of a product, query the Cloud Siem ListImportedLogsByProd API with a specific product code.

SourceLogInfo.description: The info of log to be added.

SourceProdCode.description: The product code. For all available product codes, query the Cloud Siem ListAllProds API.

SubUserId.description: The Id of the account to be submitted.

ALIYUN::CloudStorageGateway::StorageBund.description: ALIYUN::CloudStorageGateway::StorageBundle is used to create a gateway cluster.

Description.description: The description of the gateway cluster. The description must be 0 to 128 characters in length.

StorageBundleName.description: The name of the gateway cluster. The name must be 1 to 60 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, periods (.), underscores (_), and hyphens (-). It must start with a letter.

CreateTime.description: Create a gateway cluster timestamp.

Description.description: Gateway cluster description.

StorageBundleId.description: The ID of the gateway cluster.

ALIYUN::ComputeNest::IntranetConnectorEn.description: ALIYUN::ComputeNest::IntranetConnectorEndpoint is used to create an endpoint.

Description.description: The description of the endpoint, supporting full character set. The length must not exceed 500 characters.

EnablePrivateZone.description:
Whether to enable the private zone.
This parameter is only valid when the access point type is Managed.

EndpointRegionId.description: The region ID of the endpoint.

Name.description: The name of the endpoint, supporting full character set except space. The length must not exceed 200 characters. If not, it will be filled in with EndpointId automatically.

ResourceIds.description:
Endpoint instance ID, when using ECS as an access point, fill in the instance ID of this ECS. Multiple instances can be specified up to a maximum of 2. The instance is required to be under the passed VPC.
Hosted access points do not require incoming.

Type.description:
The type of the endpoint.
- Private (default) : private access point
- Managed: managed access point.

VpcId.description: The ID of the VPC to which the endpoint belongs.

ALIYUN::ComputeNest::ServiceInstance.description: The ALIYUN::ComputeNest::ServiceInstance type is used to create and deploy a service instance.

Commodity.description: The purchase order information of the cloud market does not need to be transmitted if the service is not on the cloud market or charged by volume.

DryRun.description:
Whether to perform PreCheck on the creation request, including permissions and instance status verification. Possible values:
- **true**: The request is sent without creating a service instance.
- **false**: Sends the request and creates a service instance after the check is passed.

EnableInstanceOps.description:
Whether the service instance has the O & M function. Possible values:
- true: The service instance has a generation O & M function.
- false: The service instance does not have the O & M function.

EnableUserPrometheus.description:
Whether Prometheus monitoring is enabled. Possible values:
- true: enabled.
- false: not enabled.

Parameters.description: The parameters entered by the deployment service instance.

ResourceAutoPay.description:
Whether the resource is automatically deducted from the balance. Value:
- **true**: automatic payment.
- **false**: Do not pay automatically.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of the resource group.

ServiceInstanceName.description: The name of the service instance.

Tags.description: Tags of service instance.

CreateTime.description: Creation time.

EnableInstanceOps.description: Whether the service instance has the O & M function.

IsOperated.description: Whether the generation O & M function of the service instance is enabled.

MarketInstanceId.description: The ID of the cloud marketplace instance.

Output.description: Create the output Field returned by the service instance.

Outputs.description: Create the output Field returned by the service instance.

Parameters.description: The parameters entered by the deployment service instance.

Progress.description: The deployment progress of the service instance. Unit:%.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of the resource group.

ServiceInstanceId.description: The ID of the service instance.

Source.description: The source of the service instance.

StatusDetail.description: The status description of the deployment instance.

Tags.description: User-defined labels.

UpdateTime.description: Update time.

ALIYUN::Config::AggregateCompliancePack.description: ALIYUN::Config::AggregateCompliancePack is used to create a compliance package for an account group.

ConfigRules.description:
List of rules in the compliance package.
Note: Either this parameter or TemplateContent must be set.

DefaultEnable.description:
Whether the rule supports quick activation. Value:
true: This rule will be enabled when the compliance package is quickly enabled.
false (default): disable

Description.description: The description of compliance pack.

ExcludeRegionIdsScope.description: The compliance package is invalid for the specified region ID.

ExcludeResourceGroupIdsScope.description: The compliance package is invalid for the specified resource group ID.

ExcludeResourceIdsScope.description: The compliance package is invalid for the specified resource ID, that is, no evaluation is performed on the resource.

RegionIdsScope.description: The compliance package only takes effect for resources in the specified region ID.

ResourceGroupIdsScope.description: The compliance package only takes effect on resources in the specified resource group ID.

ResourceIdsScope.description: The compliance package only takes effect on the specified resource ID.

RiskLevel.description:
Compliance package risk level. Value:
1: High risk.
2: Medium risk.
3: Low risk.

TagKeyScope.description: Compliance packages only take effect on resources bound to the specified tag key.

TagValueScope.description: Compliance packages only take effect on resources bound to specified tag key-value pairs.TagValueScope needs to be used in conjunction with TagKeyScope.

TemplateContent.description:
Template information used to generate compliance packages.
Note: Either this parameter or ConfigRules must be set.

CompliancePackId.description: The ID of the compliance pack id.

ALIYUN::Config::Aggregator.description: ALIYUN::Config::Aggregator is used to create an account group.

AggregatorAccounts.description: The member account in aggregator.When the AggregatorType is RD, this parameter can be empty, which means that all accounts in the resource directory will be added to the global account group.When the AggregatorType is FOLDER, this parameter can be empty,which means that all accounts in the resource folder will be added to the global account group.

AggregatorType.description:
Account group type. Value:
RD: Global account group.
CUSTOM: Custom account group (default value).
FOLDER: Folder account group. Must set FolderId if the AggregatorType is FOLDER. Please refer to ListAccounts for accessing FolderId.

Description.description: The description of aggregator.

ALIYUN::Config::CompliancePack.description: ALIYUN::Config::CompliancePack is used to create a compliance package.

Description.description: Description
Description

ALIYUN::Config::DeliveryChannel.description: ALIYUN::Config::DeliveryChannel is used to create or update a delivery channel.

DeliveryChannelAssumeRoleArn.description:
The Alibaba Cloud Resource Name (ARN) of the role to be assumed by the delivery method.
This parameter is required when you create a delivery method.
Note If the delivery method assumes the service linked role for Cloud Config, you can specify
the ARN in the format of the provided example and replace the account ID with the
ID of your Alibaba Cloud account.

DeliveryChannelCondition.description:
The rule attached to the delivery method. This parameter is applicable only to delivery
methods of the MNS type.
This parameter allows you to specify the lowest risk level for the events to subscribe
to and the resource types for which you want to subscribe to events.
To specify the lowest risk level for the events to subscribe to, use the following
format:{"filterType":"RuleRiskLevel","value":"1","multiple":false}.
The value field indicates the lowest risk level and can be set to 1, 2, or 3, which
indicates the high risk level, the medium risk level, and the low risk level, respectively.
To specify the resource types for which you want to subscribe to events, use the following
format:{"filterType":"ResourceType","values":["ACS::ACK::Cluster","ACS::ActionTrail::Trail","ACS::CBWP::CommonBandwidthPackage"],"multiple":true}.
The values field indicates the resource types. Its value is a JSON array.
Example: [{"filterType":"ResourceType","values":["ACS::ActionTrail::Trail","ACS::CBWP::CommonBandwidthPackage","ACS::CDN::Domain","ACS::CEN::CenBandwidthPackage","ACS::CEN::CenInstance","ACS::CEN::Flowlog","ACS::DdosCoo::Instance"],"multiple":true}]

DeliveryChannelName.description: The name of the delivery method.

DeliveryChannelTargetArn.description:
The ARN of the delivery destination. This parameter is required when you create a
delivery method. The value must be in one of the following formats:
acs:oss:{RegionId}:{Aliuid}:{bucketName} if your delivery destination is an Object Storage Service (OSS) bucket.
acs:mns:{RegionId}:{Aliuid}:/topics/{topicName} if your delivery destination is a Message Service (MNS) topic.
acs:log:{RegionId}:{Aliuid}:project/{projectName}/logstore/{logstoreName} if your delivery destination is a Log Service Logstore.

DeliveryChannelType.description:
The type of the delivery method. This parameter is required when you create a delivery
method. Valid values:
OSS
MNS
SLS

Description.description: The description of the delivery method.

DeliveryChannelId.description: The ID of the delivery method.

ALIYUN::Config::Rule.description: ALIYUN::Config::Rule is used to create or modify a rule.

ConfigRuleTriggerTypes.description: The trigger type of the rule. Valid values:  ConfigurationItemChangeNotification: The rule is triggered upon configuration changes. ScheduledNotification: The rule is triggered as scheduled.

ExcludeResourceIdsScope.description: The rule monitors excluded resource IDs, multiple of which are separated by commas, only applies to rules created based on managed rules, , custom rule this field is empty

MaximumExecutionFrequency.description: The frequency of the compliance evaluations. Valid values:  One_Hour Three_Hours Six_Hours Twelve_Hours TwentyFour_Hours

RegionIdsScope.description: The rule monitors region IDs, separated by commas, only applies to rules created based on managed rules

ResourceGroupIdsScope.description: The rule monitors resource group IDs, separated by commas, only applies to rules created based on managed rules

ResourceTypesScope.description: The types of the resources to be evaluated against the rule

RiskLevel.description: The risk level of the resources that are not compliant with the rule. Valid values:  1: critical 2: warning 3: info

SourceIdentifier.description: The identifier of the rule.  For a managed rule, the value is the name of the managed rule. For a custom rule, the value is the ARN of the custom rule

SourceOwner.description: Specifies whether you or Alibaba Cloud owns and manages the rule. Valid values:  CUSTOM_FC: The rule is a custom rule and you own the rule. ALIYUN: The rule is a managed rule and Alibaba Cloud owns the rule

EventSource.description: The event source of the rule.

ResourceGroupIdsScope.description: The rule monitors resource group IDs, separated by commas, only applies to rules created based on managed rules

RiskLevel.description: The risk level of the resources that are not compliant with the rule. Valid values:  1: critical 2: warning 3: info
