ALIYUN::MPS::MediaWorkflow.description: ALIYUN::MPS::MediaWorkflow is used to add a media workflow.

Name.description:
The topology of the media workflow.
The value cannot be empty.
The name cannot be the same as that of an existing media workflow within the current Alibaba Cloud account.
The name can be up to 64 characters in length.
The value must be encoded in the UTF-8 format.

Topology.description: The topology of the media workflow. The value must be a JSON object that contains the activities and activity dependencies. For more information, see the Sample topology section of this topic.Note The Object Storage Service (OSS) bucket must reside in the same region as your MPS service.

TriggerMode.description:
The triggering mode of the media workflow. Valid values:
OssAutoTrigger: The media workflow is automatically triggered.
NotInAuto: The media workflow is not automatically triggered.

CreationTime.description: The time when the media workflow was created.

MediaWorkflowId.description: The ID of the media workflow.

Name.description: The name of the media workflow.

State.description: The state of the media workflow.

Topology.description: The topology of the media workflow.

TriggerMode.description: The trigger mode of the media workflow.

ALIYUN::MPS::Pipeline.description: ALIYUN::MPS::Pipeline is used to create an ApsaraVideo Media Processing (MPS) queue.

Name.description:
The new name of the MPS queue. The value can contain letters, digits, and special
characters such as hyphens (-) and can be up to 128 bytes in size. The value cannot
start with a special character.

NotifyConfig.description:
The Message Service (MNS) configuration, such as the information about the MNS queue
or topic. For more information, see NotifyConfig.

Role.description: The role that is assigned to the current RAM user. To obtain the role, you can log on to the RAM console and choose Identities > Roles in the left-side navigation pane.

Speed.description:
Pipe type. Value:
Boost: Double-speed transcoding
Standard: ordinary pipe
NarrowBandHDV2: Narrowband HD 2.0
AIVideoCover: Smart Screenshots
AIVideoTag: video tag (supports regions Shanghai, Beijing, Hangzhou).
Default: Standard.

State.description:
The new state of the MPS queue.
Active: The MPS queue is active. Jobs in the MPS queue can be scheduled and run by MPS.
Paused: The MPS queue is paused. Jobs in the MPS queue cannot be scheduled or run by MPS, and all jobs remain in the Submitted state. Jobs that are running will not be affected.

PipelineId.description: The ID of the MPS queue.

Input.description: The input configuration of the job. For more information, see Input details.

OutputBucket.description: The name of the OSS bucket where the output files are stored.

OutputLocation.description: The region of the OSS bucket where the output files are stored.

Outputs.description: The output configuration of the job. Consists of a list of Output objects, JSON array, with a maximum size of 30.

ALIYUN::MSE::Cluster.description: Use ALIYUN::MSE::Cluster to create a cluster.

ChargeType.description:
Billing mode, including PREPAY (annual/monthly) and POSTPAY (pay-as-you-go).
Ignored for Serverless Edition.

ClusterSpecification.description:
Engine specification.

[Professional Edition]
- `MSE_SC_2_4_60_c`: 2 cores 4GB
- `MSE_SC_1_2_60_c`: 1 core 2GB
- `MSE_SC_4_8_60_c`: 4 cores 8GB
- `MSE_SC_8_16_60_c`: 8 cores 16GB
- `MSE_SC_16_32_60_c`: 16 cores 32GB

[Development Edition]
- `MSE_SC_1_2_60_c`: 1 core 2GB
- `MSE_SC_2_4_60_c`: 2 cores 4GB

[Serverless Edition]
- Ignore this parameter or fill with `MSE_SC_SERVERLESS`.

ClusterVersion.description:
Cluster version.

[Professional Edition]
- `NACOS_2_0_0`: Nacos 2.x.x version.
- `ZooKeeper_3_8_0`: ZooKeeper 3.8.x version.

[Development Edition]
- `NACOS_2_0_0`: Nacos 2.x version.
- `ZooKeeper_3_8_0`: ZooKeeper 3.8.x version.

[Serverless Edition]
- `NACOS_2_0_0`: Nacos 2.x version.
- `ZooKeeper_3_8_0`: ZooKeeper 3.8.x version.

ConnectionType.description: Network access type, `slb` or `single_eni`; some regions only support `single_eni` for Development Edition.

EipEnabled.description: Effective when ConnectionType is `single_eni`, indicates whether to enable public access (elastic IP).

InstanceCount.description:
Number of instance nodes. Range: 1~15.

[Professional Edition]
- Must be >=3 and odd number.

[Development Edition]
- Only 1 allowed.

[Serverless Edition]
- Ignore this parameter.

MseVersion.description:
Must be filled unless special circumstances. Valid values:
- `mse_pro`: Professional Edition.
- `mse_dev`: Development Edition.
- `mse_serverless`: Serverless Edition.

NetType.description:
Network type. Valid values:
- `privatenet`: Private network.
- `pubnet`: Public network.

PubNetworkFlow.description: Public network flow. Valid when ConnectionType is `slb`. 0 means do not create public SLB; 1 or above indicates fixed bandwidth value in Mbps. Range: 0~5000.

RequestPars.description: Extended request parameters in JSON format.

ResourceGroupId.description: Resource group id.

SecurityGroupType.description: Effective when ConnectionType is `single_eni`, represents the security group type of the instance.

Tags.description: Tags to attach to cluster. Max support 20 tags to add during create cluster. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

VSwitchId.description: Switch ID.

VpcId.description: VPC ID.

ClusterAliasName.description: The alias name of the cluster.

ConfigAuthEnabled.description: Whether to enable the configuration authentication.

ConfigSecretEnabled.description: Whether to enable the configuration secret.

HealthStatus.description: The health status of the cluster.

InstanceId.description: The ID of the cluster instance.

InternetAddress.description: The public network address of the cluster.

InternetDomain.description: The public network domain of the cluster.

InternetPort.description: The public network port of the cluster.

IntranetAddress.description: The intranet address of the cluster.

IntranetDomain.description: The intranet domain of the cluster.

IntranetPort.description: The intranet port of the cluster.

VSwitchId.description: The ID of the VSwitch.

VpcId.description: The ID of the VPC.

Id.description: The custom ID of the namespace. If you do not specify this parameter, the automatically generated Universally Unique Identifier (UUID) is returned.

Name.description: The display name of the namespace.

zh: Chinese

privatenet: private network

Simple type (slb.s1.small)

Standard type I(slb.s2.medium)

ChargeType.description: The resource charge type. Default value is Prepaid

Duration.description: Duration of the resource. If ChargeType is specified as Postpaid, this value will be ignore.

PricingCycle.description: Price cycle of the resource. This property has no default value. If ChargeType is specified as Postpaid, this value will be ignore.

ALIYUN::MaxCompute::Package.description: ALIYUN::MaxCompute::Package is used to create a package.

PackageName.description: The name of the project package.

ProjectName.description: The name of the MaxCompute project.

PackageName.description: The name of the project package.

ProjectName.description: The name of the MaxCompute project.

ALIYUN::MaxCompute::Project.description: ALIYUN::MaxCompute::Project is used to create a MaxCompute project.

ChargeType.description: Quota payment type, support PayAsYouGo, Subscription.

Name.description:
The name of the project.
It must start with a lower-case letter and contain lower-case letters, digits, and underscores (_). The value must contain 3 to 28 characters

SupportSchemaLevels.description: Whether to support schema level. Default: False

Name.description: The name of the project.

ALIYUN::MaxCompute::Quota.description: The ALIYUN::MaxCompute::Quota type is used to create a MaxCompute (previously known as ODPS) quota.

AutoPay.description: Whether to auto pay the bill.

AutoRenew.description: Whether to auto renew the prepay instance.

CU.description: The compute unit of the odps quota instance. When the specification is the StandardCompute, this parameter is required.

PayType.description:
The billing method of the odps quota instance. Valid values:
PayAsYouGo: pay-as-you-go
Subscription: subscription

Period.description:
The subscription period of the odps quotaIf PeriodUnit is month, the valid range is 1-9
If periodUnit is year, the valid range is 1, 2, 3, 4, 5

PeriodUnit.description:
The unit of the subscription duration. Valid values:
Month
Year
Default value: Month.

QuotaNickname.description: The nickname of the odps quota instance.

Specification.description: The specification of the odps quota instance.

Tunnel.description: The tunnel unit of the odps quota instance. When the specification is the Tunnel, this parameter is required

DefaultSubQuotaNickname.description: The default sub quota nickname of the odps quota instance.

Nickname.description: The nickname of the odps quota instance.

ALIYUN::MaxCompute::Role.description: ALIYUN::MaxCompute::Role is used to create a role at the MaxCompute project level.

Acl.description: The access-control list (ACL), This parameter is not required if a policy is used.

Policy.description: The document of the policy. This parameter is not required if an access-control list (ACL) is used.

ProjectName.description: The name of the MaxCompute project.

RoleName.description: The name of the project role

Type.description:
Role types, MaxCompute provides administrator roles and resource roles. Valid values:
Admin: You can grant management-related permissions to administrator roles by using policies instead of access control lists (ACLs). You cannot grant resource-related permissions to administrator roles.
Resource: You can grant resource-related permissions but not management-related permissions to resource roles.

ProjectName.description: The name of the MaxCompute project.

RoleName.description: The name of the project role.

ALIYUN::MaxCompute::Table.description: ALIYUN::MaxCompute::Table is used to create a table.

IfNotExists.description:
If you create a table by using the name of an existing table and 
the parameter set to false, an error is returned. 
If you specify the if not exists parameter, a success message 
is returned when you create a table by using the name of an 
existing table. The success message is returned even if the 
schema of the existing table is different from that of the table you want to create. 
If you create a table by using the name of an existing table, 
the table is not created and the metadata of the existing table is not changed.

Name.description: Table name

Project.description: Project name, if not provided, will be the default project

StringSchema.description:
Create a table with field names and field type strings.
Example: 'num bigint, num2 double', 'pt string'

Name.description: Table name

ALIYUN::Memcache::Instance.description: ALIYUN::MEMCACHE::Instance is used to create an ApsaraDB for Memcache (OCS) instance.

AutoRenew.description:
Specifies whether to enable auto renewal. Valid values:
true
false
Note Default value: false.

AutoRenewPeriod.description:
The period of the auto renewal. Unit: months. Valid values:
1
2
3
6
12
Note You must specify this parameter if the value of the AutoRenew parameter is true.

AutoUseCoupon.description:
Specifies whether to use a coupon. Valid values:
true
false
Note Default value: false.

Capacity.description:
The storage capacity of the instance. Unit: MB.
Note You need to pass at least one of the Capacity and InstanceClass parameters when calling
the CreateInstance operation.

ChargeType.description:
The billing method of the instance. Valid values:
PrePaid: subscription.
PostPaid: pay-as-you-go.
Note Default value: PostPaid.

Config.description:
The parameter configuration of the instance, in a JSON string. For more information,
see Set parameters.

CouponNo.description: The coupon number. Default value: youhuiquan_promotion_option_id_for_blank.

InstanceClass.description:
The instance type. For more information, see Instance types.
Note You need to pass at least one of the Capacity and InstanceClass parameters when calling
the CreateInstance operation.

InstanceName.description:
The name of the instance. The name can be 2 to 128 characters in length and must start
with a letter. The following characters are not supported: at signs (@), forward slashes (/), colons (:), equal signs (=), double quotation marks
("), angle brackets (<>), braces ([]), curly brackets ({}) and spaces.

NetworkType.description:
The network type of the instance. Valid values:
CLASSIC
VPC
Note Default value: CLASSIC.

Password.description:
The password of the instance. The password can be 8 to 32 characters in length and
must contain at least three types of the following characters: uppercase letters,
lowercase letters, digits, and special characters. Special characters include ! at signs (@), number signs (#), dollar signs ($), percent signs (%), carets (^),
ampersands (&), asterisks (*), parentheses (()), underscores (_), plus signs (+),
hyphens (-), and equal signs (=).

Period.description:
The subscription period. You must specify this parameter if the value of the ChargeType
parameter is PrePaid. Unit: months. Valid values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 12, 24,
and 36.
Note This parameter is invalid if the value of the ChargeType parameter is PostPaid.

PrivateIpAddress.description:
The internal IP address of the instance.
Note The internal IP address must be located in the Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR)
block of the VSwitch to which the instance belongs.

ResourceGroupId.description: Resource group ID.

VSwitchId.description: The ID of the VSwitch.

VpcId.description: The ID of the VPC.

VpcPasswordFree.description:
Specifies whether to enable password free for access within the VPC. If set to:
- true: enables password free.
- false: disables password free.

ZoneId.description: The ID of the zone in which the instance is created. You can call the DescribeRegions operation to query the latest region list.

ConnectionDomain.description: The internal endpoint of the instance.

InstanceId.description: The globally unique identifier (GUID) of the instance.

Port.description: Port of created instance.

ALIYUN::Memcache::Whitelist.description: ALIYUN::Memcache::Whitelist is used to create a Whitelist.

SecurityIpGroupAttribute.description: The default is empty. For distinguishing between different attribute values, the console will not display the value of hidden whitelist packet.

SecurityIps.description: IP address whitelist to be modified

SecurityIpGroupAttribute.description: The default is empty. For distinguishing between different attribute values, the console will not display the value of hidden whitelist packet.

SecurityIps.description: IP address whitelist to be modified

ALIYUN::NAS::AccessGroup.description: ALIYUN::NAS::AccessGroup is used to create a permission group.

AccessGroupType.description: Permission group type, including the Vpc and Classic types

Description.description: Permission group description. It is the same as the permission group name by default.

FileSystemType.description:
File system type.
Values: standard (default), extreme

ALIYUN::NAS::AccessRule.description: ALIYUN::NAS::AccessRule is used to create a rule for a permission group.

FileSystemType.description:
The type of file system. Values:
standard: the general NAS
extreme: the extreme NAS

Ipv6SourceCidrIp.description:
Source IPv6 CIDR address segment. IP addresses in CIDR format and IPv6 format are supported.
Currently, only the ultra-fast NAS in mainland China supports the IPv6 function, and the file system needs to enable the IPv6 function.
Only VPC private network is supported.
IPv4 and IPv6 are mutually exclusive, and the types cannot be converted.

UserAccessType.description: User permission type: no_squash (default), root_squash, all_squash

ALIYUN::NAS::DataFlow.description: ALIYUN::NAS::DataFlow is used to create a data flow between a Cloud Parallel File Storage (CPFS) file system and an Object Storage Service (OSS) bucket.

AutoRefreshInterval.description:
The automatic update interval time, every time the interval, the CPFS checks whether there is a data update in the directory. If there is data update, start the automatic update task, unit: minute.
Scope of value: 5 ~ 525600, default value: 10.

AutoRefreshPolicy.description:
Automatic update strategy, after the source data is updated, the data update is introduced to the CPFS strategy.
None (default): The data update of the source is not automatically imported into CPFS. Users can import data update at the source end of the source through data flow tasks.
Importchanged: The data update at the source automatically imports CPFS.

Description.description:
Description of data flow.
limit:
The length is 2 to 128 English or Chinese characters.
Start with a lowercase letter or Chinese, and you cannot start with http:// and https: //.
It can contain numbers, half-horn colon (:), down line (_) or short lines (-).

SourceSecurityType.description:
The type of safety protection types of the source storage. If the source storage must be protected through safety protection, please specify the type of safety protection type storage.Value:
No (default value): It means that the source storage does not need to be accessed by safe protection.
SSL: Protective access through SSL certificates.

SourceStorage.description:
Access path stored at the source.Format: <storage Type>: // <PATH>.
in:
Storage Type: Currently only supports OSS.
PATH: OSS's bucket name.Limit the following.
Only support the lowercase letters, numbers and short strokes (-) and must start with a lowercase letter or number.
The length is 8 ~ 128 English characters.
Use UTF-8 encoding.
Can't start with http: // and https: //.
Explain that the OSS BUCKET must be the bucket that exists in the region.

Throughput.description:
The upper limit of transmission bandwidth for data flow, unit: MB/s.
Value: 
600
1200
1500

Explanation The transmission bandwidth of the data flow must be smaller than the IO bandwidth of the file system.

ALIYUN::NAS::FileSystem.description: The ALIYUN::NAS::FileSystem resource type creates a NAS file system.

Bandwidth.description: Maximum file system throughput, unit is MB/s. Required and valid only when FileSystemType=cpfs.

Capacity.description: File system capacity, the unit is GB. Required and valid when FileSystemType=extreme or cpfs.

ChargeType.description:
Type of payment:
PayAsYouGo (pay as you go)
Subscription

DeletionForce.description: Whether delete all mount targets on the file system and then delete file system. Default is false

Description.description: File system description (space characters are not allowed)

Duration.description:
The period of subscription in months. Required and valid when ChargeType is Subscription.
When the annual and monthly subscription instance expires without renewal, the instance will automatically expire and be released.

EncryptType.description:
Specifies whether to encrypt data. You can use keys that are hosted by Key Management Service (KMS) to encrypt data stored on a file system. Data is automatically decrypted when you access encrypted data. Valid values:
0: specifies that no encryption is applied to data on the file system.
1: specifies that encryption is applied to data on the file system.

FileSystemType.description: File system type. Allowed values: standard(default), extreme, cpfs

ProtocolType.description: Type of protocol used. Valid values: NFS, SMB, cpfs.

ResourceGroupId.description: Resource group id.

StorageType.description:
The storage type of the file System.
Valid values:
Performance、Capacity、Premium(Available when the file_system_type is standard)
standard、advance(Available when the file_system_type is extreme)
advance_100、advance_200(Available when the file_system_type is cpfs)

Tags.description: Tags to attach to filesystem. Max support 20 tags to add during create filesystem. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

VSwitchId.description: VSwitch ID.

VpcId.description: Vpc ID.

ZoneId.description: Zone ID.

FileSystemId.description: ID of the file system created

ALIYUN::NAS::Fileset.description: ALIYUN::NAS::Fileset is used to create a fileset.

Description.description:
Fileset description information.
The length is 2 to 128 English or Chinese characters.
Start with a lowercase letter or Chinese, and you cannot start with http:// and https: //.
It can contain numbers, half-horn colon (:), down line (_) or short lines (-).

FileSystemPath.description:
The absolute path of Fileset to be created.
The parent catalog of specified the directory must be a directory in the file system.
The length is 2 to 1024 characters.
Specify the directory must start with positive (/).

ALIYUN::NAS::MountTarget.description: You can use the ALIYUN::NAS::MountTarget resource to create a mount target.

AccessGroupName.description: Permission group name. Default to DEFAULT_VPC_GROUP_NAME.

EnableIpv6.description:
Whether to create an IPv6 mount point.Value:
true: create
false (default): do not create
Note Currently, only the ultra-fast NAS in mainland China supports the IPv6 function, and the file system needs to enable the IPv6 function.

NetworkType.description: Network type, including Vpc and Classic networks.

SecurityGroupId.description: Security group Id

Status.description: Status, including Active and Inactive

VSwitchId.description: VSwitch ID.

VpcId.description: VPC network ID

ALIYUN::NAS::ProtocolMountTarget.description: ALIYUN::NAS::ProtocolMountTarget is used to create an export directory for a protocol service.

AccessGroupName.description:
The name of the permissions group.
Default value: DEFAULT_VPC_GROUP_NAME

Description.description:
Description of the protocol service to export the directory.The console is displayed as the export directory name.
limit:
The length is 2 to 128 English or Chinese characters.
Start with a lowercase letter or Chinese, and you cannot start with http:// and https: //.
It can contain numbers, half-horn colon (:), down line (_) or short lines (-).

FsetId.description:
Fileset ID needs to be exported.
limit:
The Fileset must exist.
A Fileset allows only one export directory.
Fileset and Path can only specify one.

Path.description:
The path of the CPFS directory that needs to be exported.
limit:
This directory must be existing directory on CPFS.
The same directory allows only one export.
Fileset and Path can only specify one.
Format:
The length is 1 to 1024 characters.
Use UTF-8 encoding.
It must start with the positive oblique line (/), and the root directory must be/.

VSwitchId.description: Switch ID exported by the protocol service.

VpcId.description: Proper network ID exported by the protocol service.

ExportId.description: The protocol service exports directory ID.

ALIYUN::NAS::ProtocolService.description: ALIYUN::NAS::ProtocolService is used to create a protocol service for a Cloud Paralleled File System (CPFS) file system.

Description.description:
Description of protocol service.The console shows the "protocol service name".
limit:
The length is 2 to 128 English or Chinese characters.
Start with a lowercase letter or Chinese, and you cannot start with http:// and https: //.
It can contain numbers, half-horn colon (:), down line (_) or short lines (-).

ProtocolSpec.description: The spec of protocol service. Default: General. Values: General

ProtocolType.description:
The protocol type of agreement service.
Ranges:
NFS: Agreement service supports NFS protocol access.
The default value: NFS.

Throughput.description:
The bandwidth of the agreement service.
Unit: MB/S.

VSwitchId.description: Agreement service vswitchid.

VpcId.description: The protocol service VPCID needs to be consistent with the file system VPC.

ALIYUN::NLB::BackendServerAttachment.description: ALIYUN::NLB::BackendServerAttachment is used to add backend servers to a Network Load Balancer (NLB) server group.

ServerGroupId.description: The ID of the server group.

Servers.description:
The backend servers that you want to add to the server group. You can specify up to
200 servers in each call.

ServerGroupId.description: The ID of the server group.

ALIYUN::NLB::Listener.description: Use the ALIYUN::NLB::Listener resource type to create a listener.

CaCertificateIds.description: List of the ca certificate ids

Cps.description: New connection rate limit of Instance

Enable.description: Whether to start listener or not. Default True.

ListenerPort.description: Port of the listener,[0, 65535] the portRange setting need 0

ListenerProtocol.description: Listening protocol. Values: TCP, UDP, or TCPSSL.

LoadBalancerId.description: ID of the LoadBalancer

Mss.description: Max length of the TCP packet

SecSensorEnabled.description: Whether to enable the second-level monitoring function

SecurityPolicyId.description: Only valid for TcpSSL protocol monitoring

ServerGroupTuples.description:
Multi-server group list.
When the number of destination server groups is 1, the default value is 100 if no weight is specified.
When the number of destination server groups is greater than 1, the user needs to specify the weight value.

Tags.description: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

ALIYUN::NLB::LoadBalancer.description: ALIYUN::NLB::LoadBalancer is used to create a Network Load Balancer (NLB) instance.

AddressIpVersion.description: The version of IP address that the NLB instance uses to provide services.

AddressType.description:
The type of IP address that the NLB instance uses to provide services. Valid values:
Internet: The NLB instance uses a public IP address. The domain name of the NLB instance is resolved to the public IP address. Therefore, the NLB instance can be accessed over the Internet.
Intranet: The NLB instance uses a private IP address. The domain name of the NLB instance is resolved to the private IP address. Therefore, the NLB instance can be accessed over the VPC where the NLB instance is deployed.

BandwidthPackageId.description: Attach common bandwidth package to load balancer.

CrossZoneEnabled.description: Whether enable cross zone. Default: true

DeletionProtectionConfig.description: The configuration of the deletion protection feature.

LoadBalancerBillingConfig.description: The configuration of the billing method.

LoadBalancerName.description:
The name of the NLB instance.
The name must be 2 to 128 characters in length, and can contain letters, digits, periods(.), underscores (_), and hyphens (-). The name must start with a letter.

LoadBalancerType.description: The type of the NLB instance.

ModificationProtectionConfig.description: The configuration of the configuration read-only mode.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of the resource group.

Tags.description: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

TrafficAffinityEnabled.description: Whether enable traffic affinity. Default: false

VpcId.description: The ID of the virtual private cloud (VPC) where the NLB instance is deployed.

ZoneMappings.description: The zones and the vSwitches in the zones. You must specify at least two zones.

AddressIpVersion.description: The version of IP address that the NLB instance uses to provide services.

AddressType.description: The type of IP address that the NLB instance uses to provide services.

DNSName.description: The domain name of the NLB instance.

LoadBalancerId.description: The ID of the NLB instance.

LoadBalancerType.description: The type of the NLB instance.

VpcId.description: The ID of the virtual private cloud (VPC) where the NLB instance is deployed.

ZoneMappings.description: The zones, vSwitches and addresses which are mapped to the zones.

ALIYUN::NLB::SecurityGroupAttachment.description: ALIYUN::NLB::SecurityGroupAttachment is used to bind a security group to a Network Load Balancer (NLB) instance.

LoadBalancerId.description: The ID of the network-based server load balancer instance to be bound to the security group.

ALIYUN::NLB::SecurityPolicy.description: ALIYUN::NLB::SecurityPolicy is used to create a custom security policy for a TCP/SSL listener.

Ciphers.description: TThe supported cipher suites, which are determined by the TLS protocol version. You can specify at most 32 cipher suites.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of the resource group.

SecurityPolicyName.description:
The name of the security policy.
The name must be 1 to 200 characters in length, and can contain letters, digits, periods (.), underscores (_), and hyphens (-).

Tags.description: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

TlsVersions.description: The supported versions of the Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocol. Valid values: TLSv1.0, TLSv1.1, TLSv1.2, and TLSv1.3.

SecurityPolicyId.description: The ID of the security policy.

ALIYUN::NLB::ServerGroup.description: ALIYUN::NLB::ServerGroup is used to create a server group for a Network Load Balancer (NLB) instance.

AnyPortEnabled.description:
Specifies whether to enable all-port forwarding. Valid values:
true
false (default)

ConnectionDrainEnabled.description: Whether to enable graceful connection interruption

PreserveClientIpEnabled.description: Whether to enable the client address retention function

Tags.description: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

VpcId.description: ID of VPC

ALIYUN::NLS::Project.description: ALIYUN::NLS::Project is used to create a project in Intelligent Speech Interaction.

Description.description: Description of the project.

Name.description: Name of the project.

AppKey.description: The app key of the project.

ALIYUN::OOS::ApplicationGroupDeployment.description: The ALIYUN::OOS::ApplicationGroupDeployment resource deploys an application group.

DeployParameters.description: The deploy parameters of the application group to be deployed.

Name.description: The name of the application group.

ExecutionId.description: The execution ID of the application group deployment.

Name.description: The name of the application group.

ALIYUN::OOS::DefaultPatchBaseline.description: ALIYUN::OOS::DefaultPatchBaseline is used to register a default patch baseline.

PatchBaselineName.description: The name of the patch baseline.

ApprovalRules.description: The rules of scanning and installing patches for the specified operating system.

CreatedBy.description: The creator of the patch baseline.

CreatedDate.description: The time when the patch baseline was created.

Description.description: The description of the patch baseline.

OperationSystem.description: The type of the operating system.

PatchBaselineId.description: The ID of the patch baseline.

PatchBaselineName.description: The name of the patch baseline.

ShareType.description: The share type of the patch baseline.

UpdatedBy.description: The user who last modified the patch baseline.

UpdatedDate.description: The time when the patch baseline was last modified.

ALIYUN::OOS::DeployRevision.description: The ALIYUN::OOS::DeployRevision type is used to create a deployment.

DeployResourceType.description: The type of the deploy resource.

Description.description: The description of the revision.

Hooks.description: The hook of the code to be deployed.

Location.description: The location of the code to be deployed.

ALIYUN::OOS::Execution.description: ALIYUN::OOS::Execution is used to start an execution.

Description.description: The description of OOS Execution.

LoopMode.description:
The loop mode of OOS Execution. Valid values:
- Automatic(Default): does not pause.
- FirstBatchPause: The first batch of pauses.
- EveryBatchPause: pause each batch.

Parameters.description: Parameters for the execution of template.

ResourceGroupId.description: Resource group id.

SafetyCheck.description:
Security check mode. Allowed values:
- Skip (default): This option means that customers understand the risks, you can do anything without confirmation Action, no matter what the level of risk. It takes effect only if Mode is Automatic.
- ConfirmEveryHighRiskAction: This option would require customers to confirm each Action a high risk. NotifyExecution by calling customer interface to confirm or cancel.

Tags.description: Tag value and the key mapping, the label of the key number can be up to 20.

TemplateContent.description: The content of the template in the JSON or YAML format. This parameter is the same as the Content parameter that you can specify when you call the CreateTemplate operation. You can use this parameter to specify the tasks that you want to run. This way, you do not need to create a template before you start an execution. If you select an existing template, you do not need to specify this parameter.

TemplateName.description: Template name. Content is limited to letters, numbers, underlined, underline, the length of 200 characters.

TemplateURL.description: The Object Storage Service (OSS) URL of the object that stores the content of the Operation Orchestration Service (OOS) template. The access control list (ACL) of the object must be public-read. You can use this parameter to specify the tasks that you want to run. This way, you do not need to create a template before you start an execution. If you select an existing template, you do not need to specify this parameter.

TemplateVersion.description: Version number of template. Default to the latest version.

CurlCli.description:
Convenience attribute, provides curl CLI command prefix, which can be used to notify oos execution instead of OOS API NotifyExecution.
You can notify approve to oos execution by adding --data-binary '{"data": {"NotifyType": "Approve"}}' 
For more parameters in data, refer to https://help.aliyun.com/document_detail/120777.html.
You can also notify execution via ROS API SignalResource. API parameters Status and UniqueId are ignored. Use API parameter Data to pass data.

PowerShellCurlCli.description:
Convenience attribute, provides curl CLI command prefix for PowerShell, which can be used to notify oos execution instead of OOS API NotifyExecution.
You can notify approve to oos execution by adding -Body '{"data": {"NotifyType": "Approve"}}' 
For more parameters in data, refer to https://help.aliyun.com/document_detail/120777.html.You can also notify execution via ROS API SignalResource. API parameters Status and UniqueId are ignored. Use API parameter Data to pass data.

Status.description: Execution status.

WindowsCurlCli.description:
Convenience attribute, provides curl CLI command prefix for Windows, which can be used to notify oos execution instead of OOS API NotifyExecution.
You can notify approve to oos execution by adding --data-binary "{\"data\": {\"NotifyType\": \"Approve\"}}" 
For more parameters in data, refer to https://help.aliyun.com/document_detail/120777.html.You can also notify execution via ROS API SignalResource. API parameters Status and UniqueId are ignored. Use API parameter Data to pass data.

ALIYUN::OOS::Parameter.description: ALIYUN::OOS::Parameter is used to create a common parameter.

Constraints.description:
The constraints of the parameter. 
By default, this parameter is null. Valid values:
AllowedValues: The value that is allowed for the parameter. It must be an array string.
AllowedPattern: The pattern that is allowed for the parameter. It must be a regular expression.
MinLength: The minimum length of the parameter.
MaxLength: The maximum length of the parameter.

Description.description:
The description of the parameter. 
The description must be 1 to 200 characters in length.

Name.description:
The name of the parameter. 
The name must be 1 to 200 characters in length,and can contain letters, digits, hyphens (-), and underscores (_). 
It cannot start with ALIYUN, ALIBABA, ALICLOUD, ACS or OOS.

ResourceGroupId.description: Resource group id.

Type.description:
The data type of the common parameter. 
Valid values: String and StringList.

Value.description:
The value of the parameter. 
The value must be 1 to 4096 characters in length.

Name.description: The Name of the parameter.
