ApprovedPatchesEnableNonSecurity.description: Approve whether the patch includes updates other than security.

Description.description: The description of the patch baseline.

OperationSystem.description: The type of the operating system.

PatchBaselineName.description: The name of the patch baseline.

RejectedPatchesAction.description: The operation of rejecting the patch.

ResourceGroupId.description: Resource group id

Tags.description: Tags of patch baseline.

ApprovalRules.description: The rules of scanning and installing patches for the specified operating system.

ApprovedPatchesEnableNonSecurity.description: Approve whether the patch includes updates other than security.

CreateTime.description: The time when the patch baseline was created.

CreatedBy.description: The creator of the patch baseline.

Description.description: The description of the patch baseline.

IsDefault.description: Indicates whether the patch baseline is set as the default patch baseline.

OperationSystem.description: The type of the operating system.

PatchBaselineId.description: The ID of the patch baseline.

PatchBaselineName.description: The name of the patch baseline.

RejectedPatches.description: Reject the name of the patch.

RejectedPatchesAction.description: The ID of the resource group.

ResourceGroupId.description: Approve whether the patch includes updates other than security

ShareType.description: The share type of the patch baseline.

Tags.description: Tags of patch baseline.

UpdatedBy.description: The user who last modified the patch baseline.

UpdatedDate.description: The time when the patch baseline was last modified.

ALIYUN::OOS::SecretParameter.description: ALIYUN::OOS::SecretParameter is used to create an encryption parameter.

Constraints.description: The constraints of the encryption parameter.

Description.description: The description of the encryption parameter. The description must be 1 to 200 characters in length.

KeyId.description: The Customer Master Key (CMK) of Key Management Service (KMS) that is used to encrypt the parameter.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of resource group.

SecretParameterName.description: The name of the encryption parameter. The name must be 1 to 180 characters in length, and can contain letters, digits, hyphens (-), and underscores (_). It cannot start with ALIYUN, ALIBABA, ALICLOUD, ACS or OOS.

Tags.description: Tags of encryption parameter.

Value.description: The value of the encryption parameter. The value must be 1 to 4096 characters in length.

Constraints.description: The constraints of the encryption parameter.

CreateTime.description: The time when the encryption parameter was created.

CreatedBy.description: The user who created the encryption parameter.

Description.description: The description of the encryption parameter.

KeyId.description: The Customer Master Key (CMK) of Key Management Service (KMS) that is used to encrypt the parameter.

ParameterVersion.description: The version number of the encryption parameter.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of resource group.

SecretParameterId.description: The ID of the encryption parameter.

SecretParameterName.description: The name of the encryption parameter.

ShareType.description: The share type of the encryption parameter.

Tags.description: Tags of encryption parameter.

Type.description: The data type of the encryption parameter.

UpdatedBy.description: The user who updated the encryption parameter.

UpdatedDate.description: The time when the encryption parameter was updated.

ALIYUN::OOS::ServiceSettings.description: ALIYUN::OOS::ServiceSettings is used to configure service settings.

DeliveryOssEnabled.description: Whether to enable the OSS delivery template execution logging feature. Defaults to false.

DeliveryOssKeyPrefix.description: OSS storage space directory, such as "oos/execution", pass "" to indicate that no directory is needed, if set before set again do not need directory can be cleared by passing "".

DeliverySlsEnabled.description: Whether to enable the SLS delivery template execution logging feature. Defaults to false.

ALIYUN::OOS::StateConfiguration.description: ALIYUN::OOS::StateConfiguration is used to create a desired-state configuration.

ConfigureMode.description: The configuration mode. Valid values: ApplyOnce: The configuration is applied only once. After a configuration is updated, the new configuration is applied. ApplyAndMonitor: The configuration is applied only once. After the configuration is applied, the system only checks whether the configuration is migrated in the future. ApplyAndAutoCorrect: The configuration is always applied.

Description.description: The description of the desired-state configuration.

Parameters.description: The parameters.

ResourceGroupId.description: The resource group ID.

ScheduleExpression.description: The schedule expression. The interval between two schedules must be a minimum of 30 minutes.

ScheduleType.description: The schedule type. Set the value to rate.

Tags.description: Tag value and the key mapping, the label of the key number can be up to 20.

TemplateName.description: The name of the template. The name must be 1 to 200 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, hyphens (-), and underscores (_).

TemplateVersion.description: The version number of the template. If you do not specify this parameter, the latest version of the template is used.

StateConfigurationId.description: The ID of the desired-state configuration.

ALIYUN::OOS::Template.description: The ALIYUN::OOS::Template resource type creates a template.

Content.description: The content of the template. The template must be in the JSON or YAML format. Maximum size: 64 KB.

IgnoreExisting.description:
Whether to ignore existing template
False: ROS will perform a uniqueness check.If a template with the same name exists, an error will be reported when creating it.
True: ROS will not check the uniqueness.If there is a template with the same name, the template creation process will be ignored.
If the template is not created by ROS, it will be ignored during update and delete stage.

ResourceGroupId.description: Resource group id.

Tags.description: Tag value and the key mapping, the label of the key number can be up to 20.

TemplateName.description: The name of the template. The template name can be up to 200 characters in length. The name can contain letters, digits, hyphens (-), and underscores (_). It cannot start with ACS, ALIYUN, ALIBABA, or ALICLOUD.

ALIYUN::OSS::Bucket.description: The ALIYUN::OSS::Bucket resource type creates an OSS bucket.

CORSConfiguration.description: Rules that define cross-origin resource sharing of objects in this bucket.

DeletionForce.description: Whether force delete the relative objects in the bucket. Default value is false.

EnableOssHdfsService.description:
Whether enable OSS-HDFS service. 
**Note**: Once it's enabled, it can't be disabled again.

LifecycleConfiguration.description: Rules that define how oss bucket manages objects during their lifetime.

LoggingConfiguration.description: Settings that defines where logs are stored.

RedundancyType.description:
Specifies the data disaster recovery type of the storage space. The value range is as follows:
LRS (default): Local redundant LRS stores your data redundantly on different storage devices in the same availability zone, and can support data loss and normal access even when two storage devices are damaged concurrently.
ZRS: Intra-city redundant ZRS adopts a data redundancy storage mechanism in multiple availability zones (AZ), and stores user data redundantly in multiple availability zones in the same region. When an availability zone is unavailable, normal access to data can still be guaranteed.

ResourceGroupId.description: The resource group id.

ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration.description: Specifies the bucket used to store the server-side encryption rule.

StorageClass.description: Specifies the storage class of the bucket. Default is "Standard".

Tags.description: Bucket tags in k-v pairs format.

DomainName.description: The public DNS name of the specified bucket.

InternalDomainName.description: The internal DNS name of the specified bucket.

Name.description: The name of Bucket

ALIYUN::OSS::BucketReplication.description: The ALIYUN::OSS::BucketReplication is used to specify data replication rules for an OSS bucket.

ALIYUN::OSS::Directory.description: ALIYUN::OSS::Directory is used to create a directory for a specified bucket.

DeletionForce.description: Whether force delete the relative objects in the directory. Default value is false.

ALIYUN::OSS::Domain.description: ALIYUN::OSS::Domain is used to bind a custom domain name.

ALIYUN::OSS::ObjectAcl.description: ALIYUN::OSS::ObjectAcl is used to modify the access control list (ACL) of an Object Storage Service (OSS) object.

ALIYUN::OSS::Website.description: ALIYUN::OSS::Website is used to configure static website hosting and redirection rules for an Object Storage Service (OSS) bucket.

ALIYUN::OTS::Instance.description: ALIYUN::OTS::Instance is used to create a Tablestore instance.

ClusterType.description:
Cluster type, the default is SSD. 
This parameter specifies the specification of the ots instance.
 When the value is SSD, the ots instance is a high-performance instance.
 When the value is Hybid, the ots instance is a capacity instance

Description.description: Instance description.

Network.description: Instance network type, default is NORMAL.

Tags.description: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 5 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

ALIYUN::OTS::InstanceV2.description: The ALIYUN::OTS::InstanceV2 resource type is used to create a new Tablestore instance.

ClusterType.description:
Cluster type (i.e. instance specification).
Enumeration values:
SSD: High performance.
HYBRID: Capacity type.

InstanceDescription.description: Example description. The length is limited to between 3-256 characters.

InstanceName.description:
Instance name.The naming specifications for instances are as follows:
Must consist of English letters, numbers or dash lines (-).
The first character must be in English letters.
The end character cannot be a dash (-).
Insensitive case.
The length is between 3 and 16 characters.

NetworkSourceACL.description: The allowed-network source list. All networks are allowed by default.

NetworkTypeACL.description: The instance allows the network type list, which is allowed by default.

ResourceGroupId.description: Resource Group ID.

Tags.description:
The list of instance tags in the form of key/value pairs.
You can define a maximum of 20 tags for instance.

ALIYUN::OTS::SearchIndex.description: ALIYUN::OTS::SearchIndex is used to create a search index for a data table. You can create multiple search indexes for a data table.

IndexSort.description:
This parameter specifies how data is sorted. 
By default, the data is sorted in the same way as the primary key of the table. 
If the search index contains NESTED fields, data is not sorted by default.

InstanceName.description: The name of the OTS instance in which table will locate.

TableName.description: The table name of the OTS instance.

ALIYUN::OTS::Table.description: ALIYUN::OTS::Table is used to create a table based on a specified schema.

DeviationCellVersionInSec.description: Maximum version deviation. The purpose is mainly to prohibit writing and expected large data, such as setting the deviation_cell_version_in_sec to 1000, and if the current timestamp is 10000, the timestamp range allowed to be written is [10000 - 1000, 10000 + 1000]. The valid value is 1-9223372036854775807. Defaults to 86400.

InstanceName.description: The name of the OTS instance in which table will locate.

MaxVersions.description: The maximum number of versions stored in this table. The valid value is 1-2147483647. Default to 1.

PrimaryKey.description: It describes the attribute value of primary key. The number of primary_key should not be less than one and not be more than four.

ReservedThroughput.description: The initial reserved read/write throughput setting of the table to be created, the reserved read throughput and reserved write throughput of any table cannot exceed 5000.

SecondaryIndices.description: The secondary indices of the table.

TableName.description: The table name of the OTS instance.

TimeToLive.description: The retention time of data stored in this table (unit: second). The value maximum is 2147483647 and -1 means never expired. Default to -1.

ALIYUN::OTS::VCUInstance.description: The ALIYUN::OTS::VCUInstance resource creates a Virtual Compute Unit (VCU) instance.

AutoRenewPeriodInMonth.description: Automatic renewal cycle. When automatic renewal is enabled, it is required. Value range: 1~24.

ClusterType.description:
Cluster type (i.e. instance specification).
Enumeration values:
SSD: High performance.
HYBRID: Capacity type.

EnableElasticVCU.description: Whether to enable instance elasticity. If elasticity is enabled, the peak VCU usage of the instance can exceed the purchased VCU amount, but there will be additional charges.

PeriodInMonth.description: Purchase duration. Unit: month. Value range: 1~24.

ResourceGroupId.description: Resource Group ID.

Tags.description:
The list of instance tags in the form of key/value pairs.
You can define a maximum of 20 tags for instance.

VCU.description: Number of VCU units. Value range: 0~2000.

InstanceName.description: Name of the tablestore VCU instance.

ALIYUN::OTS::VpcBinder.description: ALIYUN::OTS::VpcBinder is used to bind a Tablestore instance to a virtual private cloud (VPC).

Domains.description: The domain names used to access the OTS instance in the VPC.

Endpoints.description: Private network addresses used to access the OTS instance in the VPC.

ALIYUN::PAI::CodeSource.description: ALIYUN::PAI::CodeSource is used to create a code build in Platform for AI (PAI).

Accessibility.description:
Visibility of the code configuration, possible values:
- PRIVATE: In this workspace, it is only visible to you and the administrator.
- PUBLIC: In this workspace, it is visible to everyone.

CodeRepoAccessToken.description: The Token used to access the code repository.

CodeRepoUserName.description: The user name of the code repository.

Description.description: A detailed description of the code configuration.

DisplayName.description: Code source configuration name.

MountPath.description: The local Mount Directory of the code.

WorkspaceId.description: The ID of the workspace.

CodeRepoAccessToken.description: The Token used to access the code repository.

CodeRepoUserName.description: The user name of the code repository.

CodeSourcesId.description: The ID of the created code configuration.

CreateTime.description: The creation time of the code.

Description.description: A detailed description of the code configuration.

DisplayName.description: Code source configuration name.

GmtModifyTime.description: Code configuration modification time. The time format is iso8601.

MountPath.description: The local Mount Directory of the code.

UserId.description: The ID of the creator of the code configuration source.

WorkspaceId.description: The ID of the workspace.

ALIYUN::PAI::Dataset.description: ALIYUN::PAI::Dataset is used to create a dataset.

Accessibility.description:
Workspace visibility. The following values are supported:
- PRIVATE (default): indicates that the workspace is visible to itself and the administrator.
- PUBLIC: The workspace is visible to all users.

DataSourceType.description:
The data source type. The following values are supported:
- OSS: Alibaba Cloud Object Storage (OSS).
- NAS: Alibaba cloud file storage (NAS).

DataType.description:
The dataset type. The default value is COMMON. The following values are supported:
- COMMON: COMMON.
- PIC: picture.
- TEXT: TEXT.
- VIDEO: VIDEO.
- AUDIO: AUDIO.

DatasetName.description:
The name of the dataset. The naming rules are as follows:
- Start with a lowercase letter, uppercase letter, number, or Chinese.
- Can contain an underscore (_) or a dash (-).
- 1~127 characters in length.

Description.description: Custom descriptions of datasets to distinguish between different datasets.

Options.description:
The extended field, which is of the JsonString type.
When DLC uses a dataset, you can specify the default Mount path for the dataset by configuring the mountPath field.

Property.description:
The properties of the dataset. The following values are supported:
- FILE: FILE.
- DIRECTORY: folder.

SourceId.description:
The data source ID.
- When the SourceType is USER, SourceId can be customized.
- When SourceType is ITAG, that is, when the iTAG module labels the data set generated by the result, SourceId is the task ID of ITAG.
- When SourceType is PAI_PUBLIC_DATASET, that is, a dataset created using PAI public datasets, SourceId is empty by default.

SourceType.description:
The data source type. The default value is USER. The following values are supported:
- PAI-PUBLIC-DATASET:PAI public dataset.
- ITAG: The dataset generated by the iTAG module annotation result.
- USER: The data set registered by the USER.

Uri.description:
The Uri configuration sample is as follows:
- The data source type is OSS:'oss:// bucket.endpoint/object'
- The data source type is NAS:
The general NAS format is: 'nas://<nasfisid>.region/subpath/to/dir/';
CPFS1.0:'nas://<cpfs-fsid>.region/subpath/to/dir /';
CPFS2.0:'nas://<cpfs-fsid>.region/<protocolserviceid>/'.
CPFS1.0 and CPFS2.0 are distinguished by the format of fsid: CPFS1.0 is cpfs-<8-bit ascii characters>;CPFS2.0 is cpfs-<16 ascii characters>.

WorkspaceId.description:
The ID of the workspace where the dataset is located.
If this parameter is not configured, the default workspace is used. If the default workspace does not exist, an error is reported.

CreateTime.description: The creation time of the resource.

DataType.description: The dataset type. The default value is COMMON.

DatasetId.description: The first ID of the resource.

Description.description: Custom descriptions of datasets to distinguish between different datasets.

Options.description: The extended field, which is of the JsonString type.

OwnerId.description: The ID of the primary account.

SourceType.description: The data source type. The default value is USER.

Uri.description: The Uri configuration sample is as follows:.

UserId.description: The ID of the user to which the dataset belongs.

WorkspaceId.description: The ID of the workspace where the dataset is located.

ALIYUN::PAI::DatasetVersion.description: ALIYUN::PAI::DatasetVersion is used to create a dataset version.

DataCount.description: The number of dataset files, in units of pieces.

DataSize.description: The size of the dataset file in bytes.

DataSourceType.description:
The data source type. The following values are supported:
- OSS: Alibaba Cloud Object Storage (OSS).
- NAS: Alibaba cloud file storage (NAS).
- CPFS

Description.description: To create a custom description for dataset versions in order to distinguish between different versions of the dataset.

Options.description:
The extended field, which is of the JsonString type.
When DLC uses a dataset, you can specify the default Mount path for the dataset by configuring the mountPath field.

Property.description:
The properties of the dataset. The following values are supported:
- FILE: FILE.
- DIRECTORY: folder.

SourceId.description:
The data source ID.
- When the SourceType is USER, SourceId can be customized.
- When SourceType is ITAG, that is, when the iTAG module labels the data set generated by the result, SourceId is the task ID of ITAG.
- When SourceType is PAI_PUBLIC_DATASET, that is, a dataset created using PAI public datasets, SourceId is empty by default.

SourceType.description:
The data source type. The default value is USER. The following values are supported:
- PAI-PUBLIC-DATASET:PAI public dataset.
- ITAG: The dataset generated by the iTAG module annotation result.
- USER: The data set registered by the USER.

Uri.description:
The Uri configuration sample is as follows:
- The data source type is OSS:'oss://bucket.endpoint/object'
- The data source type is NAS:
The general NAS format is: 'nas://<nasfisid>.region/subpath/to/dir/';
CPFS1.0:'nas://<cpfs-fsid>.region/subpath/to/dir /';
CPFS2.0:'nas://<cpfs-fsid>.region/<protocolserviceid>/'.
CPFS1.0 and CPFS2.0 are distinguished by the format of fsid: CPFS1.0 is cpfs-<8-bit ascii characters>;CPFS2.0 is cpfs-<16 ascii characters>.

ALIYUN::PAI::Experiment.description: ALIYUN::PAI::Experiment is used to create an experiment.

ArtifactUri.description: ArtifactUri is default OSS storage path of the output of trials in the experiment.

ExperimentName.description: Name is the name of the experiment, unique in a namespace.

WorkspaceId.description: WorkspaceId is the workspace id which contains the experiment.

ArtifactUri.description: ArtifactUri is default OSS storage path of the output of trials in the experiment.

CreateTime.description: GmtCreateTime is time when this entity is created.

ExperimentId.description: ExperimentId is globally unique identifier of the experiment.

ExperimentName.description: Name is the name of the experiment, unique in a namespace.

GmtModifiedTime.description: GmtModifiedTime is time when this entity is modified.

Labels.description: Labels are tags of the experiment.

OwnerId.description: OwnerId is the user account id which this entity belongs to.

TensorboardLogUri.description: TensorboardLogUri is the default OSS storage path of tensorboard log of trials in the experiment.

UserId.description: UserId is the user account id which created this entity.

WorkspaceId.description: WorkspaceId is the workspace id which contains the experiment.

ALIYUN::PAI::Run.description: ALIYUN::PAI::Run is used to create a run. A run belongs to an experiment and can be associated with a workload. A run can also represent a single code execution.

ExperimentId.description: Resource attribute field of the experiment ID to which Run belongs.

SourceId.description: Attribute Resource field representing the source task ID.

SourceType.description: Resource attribute fields representing the source type.

CreateTime.description: The creation time of the Run.

ExperimentId.description: Resource attribute field of the experiment ID to which Run belongs.

GmtModifiedTime.description: Resource attribute fields representing edit time.

Labels.description: Run attribute field representing the run tag.

Metrics.description: Resource attribute field representing the run metric.

Params.description: Resource attribute field representing the run parameter.

SourceId.description: Attribute Resource field representing the source task ID.

SourceType.description: Run attribute fields representing the source type.

UserId.description: Run attribute field representing creator ID.

WorkspaceId.description: Resource attribute field of the workspace ID to which Run belongs.

ALIYUN::PAI::Service.description: ALIYUN::PAI::Service is used to create an Elastic Algorithm Service (EAS) service in Machine Learning Platform for AI (PAI).

Develop.description: Whether to enter the development mode.

CallerUid.description: The ID of the service creator, which can be the ID of the RAM account.

CreateTime.description: Creation time of the service.

CurrentVersion.description: Current running version of the service.

InternetEndpoint.description: Public network Endpoint of the service.

IntranetEndpoint.description: The intranet Endpoint of the service.

LatestVersion.description: The latest version of the service.

Namespace.description: The namespace to which the service belongs.

ParentUid.description: Primary account ID of the creator.

PendingInstance.description: Number of instances where the service is not currently ready.

Resource.description: The ID of the resource group to which the service belongs.

ResourceAlias.description: Name of the resource group where the service resides.

RunningInstance.description: Number of instances in service running.

ServiceGroup.description: Group to which the service belongs.

TotalInstance.description: Total number of instances required by the service.

UpdateTime.description: Service Last Updated.

ALIYUN::PAI::Workspace.description: ALIYUN::PAI::Workspace is used to create a workspace.

Description.description: Workspace description, no more than 80 characters.

DisplayName.description:
It is recommended that you name the workspace based on the business attribute to identify the purpose of the workspace. If not configured, the default value is the workspace name. The format is as follows:
- 3 to 23 characters in length and can contain letters, underscores, or numbers.
- Must start with a large or small letter.
- Unique in the current region.

EnvTypes.description:
Environments contained in the workspace:
- Simple mode only production environment (prod).
- Standard mode includes development environment (dev) and production environment (prod).

WorkspaceName.description:
The workspace name. The format is as follows:
- 3 to 23 characters in length and can contain letters, underscores, or numbers.
- Must start with a large or small letter.
- Unique in the current region.

Creator.description: The user ID of the creator.

Description.description: Workspace description, no more than 80 characters.

DisplayName.description: It is recommended that you name the workspace based on the business attribute to identify the purpose of the workspace. If not configured, the default value is the workspace name.

ExtraInfos.description: Additional information, currently including TenantId (tenant ID).

Owner.description: Workspace owner ID, displayed when Verbose is true.

WorkspaceId.description: The ID of the workspace.

ALIYUN::PAI::WorkspaceResourceDlc.description: ALIYUN::PAI::WorkspaceResourceDlc is used to associate Deep Learning Containers (DLC) resources with a workspace.

GroupName.description: Resource group name. If you want to obtain a resource group name, see [ListResources].

IsDefault.description: Indicates whether it is the default resource. Currently, this parameter only supports the input of true and does not support false.

Option.description:
Create behavior that supports the following values:
- CreateAndAttach: Create resource and bind to workspace
- Attach: bind resource to workspace.

WorkspaceId.description: The ID of the workspace to which the workspace belongs.

CreateTime.description: The creation time of the resource.

GroupName.description: Resource group name. If you want to obtain a resource group name, see [ListResources].

IsDefault.description: Indicates whether it is the default resource. Currently, this parameter only supports the input of true and does not support false.

ALIYUN::PAI::WorkspaceResourceFlink.description: ALIYUN::PAI::WorkspaceResourceFlink is used to associate Realtime Compute for Apache Flink resources with a workspace.

GroupName.description: Resource group name. If you want to obtain a resource group name, see [ListResources].

IsDefault.description: Indicates whether it is the default resource. Currently, this parameter only supports the input of true and does not support false.

Option.description:
Create behavior that supports the following values:
- CreateAndAttach: Create resource and bind to workspace
- Attach: bind resource to workspace.

WorkspaceId.description: The ID of the workspace to which the workspace belongs.

CreateTime.description: The creation time of the resource.

GroupName.description: Resource group name. If you want to obtain a resource group name, see [ListResources].

IsDefault.description: Indicates whether it is the default resource. Currently, this parameter only supports the input of true and does not support false.

ALIYUN::PAI::WorkspaceResourceMaxCompute.description: ALIYUN::PAI::WorkspaceResourceMaxCompute is used to associate MaxCompute resources with a workspace.

GroupName.description: Resource group name. If you want to obtain a resource group name.

IsDefault.description: Indicates whether it is the default resource. Currently, this parameter only supports the input of true and does not support false.

Option.description:
Create behavior that supports the following values:
- CreateAndAttach: Create resource and bind to workspace
- Attach: bind resource to workspace.

WorkspaceId.description: The ID of the workspace to which the workspace belongs.

CreateTime.description: The creation time of the resource.

GroupName.description: Resource group name.

IsDefault.description: Indicates whether it is the default resource. Currently, this parameter only supports the input of true and does not support false.

ALIYUN::PAIDLC::Job.description: ALIYUN::PAIDLC::Job is used to create a Machine Learning Platform for AI (PAI) job to run in a cluster.

CodeSource.description: The code source used in this task.Before the mission node starts, the DLC will automatically download the code configured in the code source, and mount to the local directory of the container.

DataSources.description: List of data source used for task operation.

DisplayName.description:
The name of the task is as follows:
The name length does not exceed 256 characters.
Allow numbers, letters, lower strokes (_), English period (.) And short horizontal lines (-).

JobMaxRunningTimeMinutes.description: The longest running time is running, and the unit is minutes.

JobSpecs.description:
Jobspecs describes various configurations of tasks during the mission, such as mirror address, start command, node resource statement, number of copies, etc.
The DLC task consists of different types of nodes. The same type of nodes have exactly the same configuration. This configuration is called a Jobspec. Jobspecs describes the configuration of all types of nodes and is the array of Jobspec.

JobType.description: The type of job. Values: TFJob, PyTorchJob, XGBoostJob, OneFlowJob, ElasticBatch

Options.description: The additional configuration of this task can adjust some of the behavior of the mounting data source through this parameter.If the task has a data source that mounted the OSS type, you can cover the default parameters of the jinofs by configure the configuration of this parameter to fs.OSS.DOWNLOAD.CONCURRENCY = 4, fs.oss.download.queue.size = 16.

Priority.description:
The priority of the task, optional parameter, default value 1, the range of parameter values is 1 ~ 9.in:
1 is the minimum priority.
9 is the highest priority.

ResourceId.description:
Resource group ID, optional parameter.
The parameter value is empty indicating that submitted to the public resource group.
If the current working space has been bound to a proprietary resource group, you can specify the corresponding resource group ID here; how to create a proprietary resource group and inquire about the proprietary resource group ID, please refer to the preparation and management of the DLC resource group cluster.

SuccessPolicy.description:
The successful strategy of distributed multi -machine tasks is currently only supported by TensorFlow's multi -machine task.
ChiefWorker: When it is specified as this value, as long as the Chief's POD is successful, it is considered that the entire task is successful.
All workers: All workers must be successful to think that the entire task is successful.

ThirdpartyLibDir.description: The name folder of the Requirements.txt file is located; before each node runs the specified usercommand, PAI -DLC will take the requirements.txt file from the specified folder and call the PIP Install -R installation.

ThirdpartyLibs.description: Python third-party library list to be installed.

UserCommand.description: Start commands of all nodes in the task.

WorkspaceId.description: Work space ID, how to get working space ID, see listworkSpaces.

JobId.description: The task ID created this time.

ALIYUN::PAIDLC::Tensorboard.description: ALIYUN::PAIDLC::Tensorboard is used to create a TensorBoard instance.

DataSourceId.description: For dataset ID, see the data set ID, see ListDataSets.

DataSourceType.description: The type of dataset. Values: OSS,NAS

DisplayName.description: Tensorboard name.

JobId.description: Task ID.How to get the task ID, see Listjobs.

MaxRunningTimeMinutes.description: The longest running time, the unit is: minutes.

Memory.description: Memory size, the unit is: GB.

Options.description: The expansion field of the dataset is JSON format, which currently supports Mountpath: the path of custom dataset mounting.

SourceType.description: Source type.

SummaryRelativePath.description: Summary relative directory. Summary relative directory and Summary directory are mutually exclusive

Uri.description:
URI of a dataset:
When DataSourceType is OSS, the format is: OSS: // [OSS-BUCET]. [Endpoint]/[Path].
When the DataSourceType is NAS, the format is: nas:// [nas-filesystem-id]. [Region]/[PATH].

WorkspaceId.description: Work space ID.How to get working space ID, see ListworkSpaces.

ALIYUN::PAIDatasetAcc::Endpoint.description: ALIYUN::PAIDatasetAcc::Endpoint is used to create and register a mount target for a slot in Dataset Accelerator of Platform for AI (PAI).

InstanceId.description: The ID of the acceleration instance

Name.description: The name of the Mount Target.

Type.description: The network type of the Mount Target.

VpcId.description: The ID of the VPC.

EndpointId.description: The ID of the Mount Target.

ALIYUN::PAIPlugin::Campaign.description: ALIYUN::PAIPlugin::Campaign is used to create an operational activity.

Name.description: The name of the campaign.

CampaignId.description: The Campaign ID created this time.

ALIYUN::PAIPlugin::Group.description: ALIYUN::PAIPlugin::Group is used to create a user group.

Algorithm.description: Association algorithm. This must be specified when Source is 4(Algorithm).

Column.description: Mobile phone number column name. The Source is 2(Multi-column CSV File) or 3(MaxCompute Table) needs to be specified when it contains mobile phone numbers.

Filter.description: Filter condition. This condition can be specified when Source is 3(MaxCompute Table).

InferenceJobId.description: Prediction task ID.This condition can be specified when Source is 4(Algorithm).

Name.description: The name of the user group.

PhoneNumber.description: Whether to include mobile phone numbers. People with mobile phone numbers can be used for reach plans.

Project.description: MaxCompute (ODPS) project name. This parameter must be specified when Source is 3(MaxCompute Table).

Remark.description: The notes of the user group.

Source.description:
Crowd source. Valid values:
0: Enter phone numbers.
1: Single-column CSV File (Phone Numbers).
2: Multi-column CSV File.
3: MaxCompute Table.
4: Algorithm.

Table.description: MaxCompute (ODPS) table name. This parameter must be specified when Source is 3(MaxCompute Table).

Text.description: The text of the phone number. This must be specified when Source is 0(Enter phone numbers).

Uri.description: File address. It needs to be specified when Source is 1(Single-column CSV File) or 2(Multi-column CSV File).

Amount.description: The number of the user group.

CreatedTime.description: The creation time of the user group.

Id.description: The ID of the user group.

Name.description: The name of the user group.

ALIYUN::PAIPlugin::InferenceJob.description: ALIYUN::PAIPlugin::InferenceJob is used to create a prediction job.

CampaignId.description: The campaign id of inference job.

DataPath.description: The input data path of inference job.

Name.description: The name of inference job.

TargetPath.description: The output result path of inference job.

TrainingJobId.description: The training job id of inference job.

UserConfig.description: The user config of inference job.

WaitForInferenceFinish.description: Whether resource creation waits for the inference task to complete.The longest waiting time is 40 minutes

GroupId.description: The related group id of infernce job result.

ALIYUN::PAIPlugin::Signature.description: ALIYUN::PAIPlugin::Signature is used to register a signature.

Description.description: Application instructions.

Name.description: The name of the Signature.

CreatedTime.description: The creation time of the Signature.

Description.description: Application instructions.

Name.description: The name of the Signature.

ALIYUN::PAIPlugin::Template.description: ALIYUN::PAIPlugin::Template is used to create a template.

Description.description: For the template content, please keep the total word count within 70 words. The excess will be charged as long text messages. Each text message is recorded as 67 words.

Name.description: The name of the template.

Signature.description: The name of the Signature, You must select either Signature or SignatureId, but not both.

SignatureId.description: The ID of the Signature, You must select either Signature or SignatureId, but not both.

Type.description:
The type of the template. The following values are supported:
0: Verification code.
1: SMS notification.
2: Promotional SMS.

CreatedTime.description: The creation time of the Signature.

Description.description: Application instructions.

Name.description: The name of the Signature.

ALIYUN::PAIPlugin::TrainingJob.description: ALIYUN::PAIPlugin::TrainingJob is used to create a training job.

DataPath.description: The training data path in OSS bucket.

Name.description: The name of training job.

UserConfig.description: User configuration is used to set parameters such as start_date and end_date to delineate the time range of modeling data.

WaitForTrainingFinish.description: Whether resource creation waits for the training task to complete.The longest waiting time is 40 minutes

ALIYUN::POLARDB::AITask.description: ALIYUN::POLARDB::AITask is used to enable the PolarDB for AI feature.

DBClusterId.description: The ID of the DB cluster.

NodeType.description:
The type of the node. Valid values:
DLNode: AI node(default).
SearchNode: Search ai node.

Password.description: The password of the database account that enables the PolarDB for AI function is required.

Username.description: The database account that enables the PolarDB for AI function is required.

DBClusterId.description: The ID of the DB cluster.

ALIYUN::POLARDB::Account.description: The ALIYUN::POLARDB::Account resource type creates accounts for PolarDB databases.

AccountDescription.description:
The description of the database account. The description must comply with the following rules:
- It cannot start with http:// or https://.
- It must be 2 to 256 characters in length.

AccountName.description:
The name of the database account. The name must comply with the following rules:
- It must start with a lowercase letter and consist of lowercase letters, digits, and underscores (_).
- It can be up to 16 characters in length.

AccountPassword.description:
The password of the database account. The password must comply with the following rules:
- It must consist of uppercase letters, lowercase letters, digits, and special characters.
- Special characters include exclamation points (!), number signs (#), dollar signs ($), percent signs (%), carets (^), ampersands (&), asterisks (*), parentheses (()), underscores (_), plus signs (+), hyphens (-), and equal signs (=).
- It must be 8 to 32 characters in length.

AccountPrivilege.description:
The permissions of the database account on the database. Valid values:
ReadWrite: has read and write permissions on the database.
ReadOnly: has the read-only permission on the database.
DMLOnly: runs only data manipulation language (DML) statements.
DDLOnly: runs only data definition language (DDL) statements.
ReadIndex: has read and index permissions on the database.
Default value: ReadWrite.
Separate multiple permissions with a comma (,).

AccountType.description:
The type of the database account. Valid values:
- Normal: standard account
- Super: privileged account
Default value: Super.
Currently, POLARDB for PostgreSQL and POLARDB compatible with Oracle do not support standard accounts.
You can create only one privileged account for an ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster.

DBClusterId.description: The ID of the ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster for which a database account is to be created.

DBName.description: The name of the database whose access permissions are to be granted to the database account. Separate multiple databases with a comma (,).

PrivForAllDB.description:
Whether to grant permissions to all libraries in the current cluster and any libraries that will be added in the future. Valid values:
- 0 (default)): Not authorized.
- 1: Authorization.

ALIYUN::POLARDB::AccountPrivilege.description: ALIYUN::POLARDB::AccountPrivilege is used to grant access permissions on one or more databases in a specified ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster to a standard account.

AccountName.description: The name of the database account to be granted access permissions.

AccountPrivilege.description:
The permissions of the database account on the database. Valid values:
- ReadWrite: has read and write permissions on the database.
- ReadOnly: has the read-only permission on the database.
- DMLOnly: runs only data manipulation language (DML) statements.
- DDLOnly: runs only data definition language (DDL) statements.
The number of account permissions specified by the AccountPrivilege parameter must be the same as that of database names specified by the DBName parameter. Each account permission must correspond to a database name in sequence.
Separate multiple permissions with a comma (,).

DBClusterId.description: The ID of the ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster to which a database account belongs.

DBName.description:
The name of the database whose access permissions are to be granted to the database account.
You can grant access permissions on one or more databases to the database account.
Separate multiple databases with a comma (,).

ApplicationType.description: The type of the application. This parameter is required.

Architecture.description: The architecture of the application. This parameter is required.

DBClusterId.description: The ID of the database cluster.

Description.description: The description of the application.

PayType.description:
The billing method of the cluster. Valid values:
Postpaid: pay-as-you-go
Prepaid: subscription

Period.description: The period of the application.

PolarFSInstanceId.description: The ID of the PolarFS instance.

SecurityGroupId.description: The ID of the security group.

SecurityIPList.description: The security IP list of the component.

VSwitchId.description: The ID of the VSwitch.

VpcId.description: The ID of the VPC.

ZoneId.description: The ID of the zone.

NetType.description: Network type for adding connection address.

ALIYUN::POLARDB::Backup.description: ALIYUN::POLARDB::Backup is used to create a full snapshot backup for a PolarDB cluster.

DBClusterId.description: The cluster ID.

BackupJobId.description: The ID of the backup set.

DBClusterId.description: The ID of the cluster.

ALIYUN::POLARDB::DBCluster.description: The ALIYUN::POLARDB::DBCluster resource type creates a PolarDB cluster.

AllowShutDown.description: Whether to turn on No activity pause. The default is false.

Architecture.description:
The architecture of CPU. Valid values:
X86
ARM

AutoRenewPeriod.description: Set the cluster auto renewal time. Valid values: 1, 2, 3, 6, 12, 24, 36. Default to 1.

BackupRetentionPolicyOnClusterDeletion.description:
The backup set retention policy when deleting a cluster, the value range is as follows:
ALL: Keep all backups permanently.
LATEST: Permanently keep the last backup (automatic backup before deletion).
NONE: The backup set is not retained when the cluster is deleted.
When creating a cluster, the default value is NONE, that is, the backup set is not retained when the cluster is deleted.
Note: This parameter takes effect only when the value of DBType is MySQL.

CloneDataPoint.description:
The time point of data to be cloned. Valid values:
LATEST: clones data of the latest time point.
<BackupID>: clones historical backup data. Specify the ID of the specific backup set.
<Timestamp>: clones data of a historical time point. Specify the specific time in
the yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ format. The time must be in UTC.
Default value: LATEST.
Note
This parameter takes effect only when the DBType parameter is set to MySQL, the DBVersion parameter is set to 5.6, and the CreationOption parameter is set to CloneFromRDS or CloneFromPolarDB.
If the CreationOption parameter is set to CloneFromRDS, the value of this parameter must be LATEST.

ClusterNetworkType.description: The network type of the cluster. Currently, only VPC is supported. Default value: VPC.

CreationCategory.description: Cluster series. The value could be Normal (standard version), Basic, ArchiveNormal, NormalMultimaster and SENormal.

CreationOption.description:
The method for creating an ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster. Valid values:
Normal: creates an ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster.
CloneFromPolarDB: clones data from an existing ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster to a new ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster.
CloneFromRDS: clones data from an existing ApsaraDB for RDS instance to a new ApsaraDB
for POLARDB cluster.
MigrationFromRDS: migrates data from an existing ApsaraDB for RDS instance to a new ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster. The created ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster is in read-only mode and has binary logs enabled by default.
CreateGdnStandby: Create a secondary cluster.
RecoverFromRecyclebin: Recovers data from the freed PolarDB cluster to the new PolarDB cluster.
UpgradeFromPolarDB: Upgrade migration from PolarDB.
Default value: Normal.
Note:
When DBType is MySQL and DBVersion is 5.6, this parameter can be specified as CloneFromRDS or MigrationFromRDS.
When DBType is MySQL and DBVersion is 8.0, this parameter can be specified as CreateGdnStandby.

DBClusterDescription.description:
The description of the cluster. The description must comply with the following rules:
It must start with a Chinese character or an English letter.
It can contain Chinese and English characters, digits, underscores (_), and hyphens (-).
It cannot start with http:// or https://.
It must be 2 to 256 characters in length.

DBClusterParameters.description: Modifies the parameters of a the PolarDB cluster.

DBMinorVersion.description:
The minor version of the cluster. Valid values:
8.0.2
8.0.1
This parameter is valid only when the DBType parameter is set to MySQL and the DBVersion parameter is set to 8.0.

DBNodeClass.description: The node specifications of the cluster. For more information, see Specifications and pricing.

DBNodeNum.description:
The number of Standard Edition nodes.
Valid values for PolarDB for MySQL Standard Edition: 1 to 8.
Valid values for PolarDB for MySQL Enterprise Edition: 1 to 16.

DBType.description:
Database type, value:
MySQL
PostgreSQL
Oracle

DBVersion.description:
The version of the database. Valid values:
MySQL: 5.6, 5.7 or 8.0
PostgreSQL: 11, 14, 15
Oracle: 11, 14

DefaultTimeZone.description:
Set up a time zone (UTC), the value range is as follows:
System:  The default time zone is the same as the time zone where the region is located. This is default value.
Other pickable value range is from -12:00 to +13:00, for example, 00:00.
Note: This parameter takes effect only when DBType is MySQL.

DeletionProtection.description: Specifies whether to enable the release protection feature for the cluster. Default is false.

GDNId.description:
The ID of the Global Database Network (GDN).
Note: This parameter is required when the CreationOption is CreateGdnStandby.

HotStandbyCluster.description:
Specifies whether to enable the hot standby storage cluster feature. Default value: ON. Valid values:
ON: enables the hot standby storage cluster feature.
OFF: disables the hot standby storage cluster feature
STANDBY: enables the hot standby storage cluster feature only for Standard Edition clusters.
The default value for Standard Edition clusters is STANDBY.

LoosePolarLogBin.description:
Enable the Binlog function, the value range is as follows:
ON: The cluster enables the Binlog function
OFF: The cluster disables the Binlog function
This parameter takes effect only when the parameter DBType is MySQL.

LooseXEngine.description:
Enable the X-Engine storage engine function, the value range is as follows:
ON: The cluster starts the X-Engine enginen
OFF: The cluster shuts down the X-Engine engine
This parameter takes effect only when the parameter CreationOption is not equal to CreateGdnStandby, DBType is MySQL and DBVersion is 8.0. The memory specification of the node with X-Engine enabled must be greater than or equal to 16 GB.

LooseXEngineUseMemoryPct.description:
Set the ratio of enabling the X-Engine storage engine, an integer ranging from 10 to 90.
This parameter takes effect only when the parameter LooseXEngine is ON.

LowerCaseTableNames.description:
Whether the table name is case sensitive, the value range is as follows:
1: Not case sensitive0: case sensitive
The default value is 1.
Note: This parameter takes effect only when the value of DBType is MySQL.

MaintainTime.description:
The maintainable time of the cluster:
Format: HH: mmZ- HH: mmZ.
Example: 16:00Z-17:00Z, which means 0 to 1 (UTC+08:00) for routine maintenance.

ParameterGroupId.description:
The ID of the parameter template.
You can call the DescribeParameterGroups operation to query the details of all parameter templates of a specified region, such as the ID of a parameter template.

PayType.description:
The billing method of the cluster. Valid values:
Postpaid: pay-as-you-go
Prepaid: subscription

Period.description:
The subscription period of the clusterIf PeriodUnit is month, the valid range is 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 12, 24, 36
If periodUnit is year, the valid range is 1, 2, 3

PeriodUnit.description:
The unit of the subscription duration. Valid values:
Month
Year
Default value: Month.

ProvisionedIops.description:
ESSD AutoPL preconfigured read and write IOPS for cloud disk. Possible values: 0-min {50,000, 1000* capacity - baseline performance}.
Baseline performance =min{1,800+50* capacity, 50000}.

ProxyClass.description:
The specifications of the Standard Edition PolarProxy. Valid values:
polar.maxscale.g2.medium.c: 2 cores
polar.maxscale.g2.large.c: 4 cores
polar.maxscale.g2.xlarge.c: 8 cores
polar.maxscale.g2.2xlarge.c: 16 cores
polar.maxscale.g2.3xlarge.c: 24 cores
polar.maxscale.g2.4xlarge.c: 32 cores
polar.maxscale.g2.8xlarge.c: 64 cores

ProxyType.description:
The type of PolarProxy. Default value: OFF. Valid values:
OFF: disables PolarProxy.
EXCLUSIVE: Dedicated Enterprise Edition
GENERAL: Standard Enterprise Edition

RenewalStatus.description:
The auto renewal status of the cluster Valid values:
AutoRenewal: automatically renews the cluster.
Normal: manually renews the cluster.
NotRenewal: does not renew the cluster.
Default value: Normal.
Note If this parameter is set to NotRenewal, the system does not send a reminder for expiration,
but only sends an SMS message three days before the cluster expires to remind you
that the cluster is not renewed.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of the resource group.

RestartMasterNode.description: Whether to restart the master node.

SSLEnabled.description:
Modifies the SSL status. Valid values:
Disable: disables SSL encryption.
Enable: enables SSL encryption.
Update: updates the SSL certificate.

ScaleRoNumMax.description: The maximum scaling limit for the number of read-only nodes.

ScaleRoNumMin.description: The minimum scaling limit for the number of read-only nodes.

SecurityGroupIds.description:
The ID of the security group. 
You can add up to three security groups to a cluster.

SecurityIPList.description: The whitelist of the Apsara PolarDB cluster.

SourceResourceId.description:
The ID of the source RDS instance or source POLARDB cluster.
Note
This parameter takes effect only when the DBType parameter is set to MySQL and the DBVersion parameter is set to 5.6.
This parameter is required if the CreationOption parameter is not set to Normal.

StandbyAZ.description:
The zone where the hot standby storage cluster is stored. This is valid for Standard Edition clusters of Multi-zone Edition.
This parameter takes effect only when the multi-zone data consistency feature is enabled.

StorageAutoScale.description:
Whether to enable automatic storage scale for standard version clusters. The value range is as follows:
Enable: Enable automatic storage scale.
Disable: Disable automatic storage scale.

StorageSpace.description:
The storage space that uses the subscription billing method. Unit: GB.
Valid values for PolarDB for MySQL Standard Edition: 20 to 32000.

StorageType.description:
The storage type. Valid values for Enterprise Edition:
PSL5
PSL4
Valid values for Standard Edition:
ESSDPL0
ESSDPL1
ESSDPL2
ESSDPL3
ESSDAUTOPL
This parameter is invalid for serverless clusters.

StorageUpperBound.description:
Set the upper limit of automatic scale of standard cluster storage, unit: GB.
The maximum value is 32000.

StrictConsistency.description:
Specifies whether to enable the multi-zone data consistency feature. Valid values:
ON: enables the multi-zone data consistency feature, which is valid for Standard Edition clusters of Multi-zone Edition.
OFF: disables the multi-zone data consistency feature.

TDEStatus.description:
Specifies whether to enable Transparent Data Encryption (TDE). Valid values:
true: enable TDE
false: disable TDE (default)
Note: The parameter takes effect only when DBType is PostgreSQL or Oracle. You cannot disable TDE after it is enabled.

Tags.description: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

VSwitchId.description: The ID of the VSwitch to connect to.

VpcId.description: The ID of the VPC to connect to.

ZoneId.description: The zone ID of the cluster. You can call the DescribeRegions operation to query available zones.

ClusterConnectionString.description: The cluster connection string of the db cluster.

ClusterEndpointId.description: The cluster endpoint ID of the db cluster.

ColdStorageInstanceId.description: The ID of the cold storage instance.

CustomConnectionStrings.description: The custom connection strings of the db cluster.

CustomEndpointIds.description: The custom endpoint IDs of the db cluster.

DBClusterDescription.description: The description of the db cluster.

DBClusterId.description: The ID of the ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster.

DBNodeIds.description: The ID list of cluster nodes.

PrimaryConnectionString.description: The primary connection string of the db cluster.

PrimaryConnectionStrings.description: The primary connection strings of the db cluster.

PrimaryEndpointId.description: The primary endpoint ID of the db cluster.

PrimaryEndpointIds.description: The primary endpoint IDs of the db cluster.

ALIYUN::POLARDB::DBClusterAccessWhiteLis.description: ALIYUN::POLARDB::DBClusterAccessWhiteList is used to modify the IP address whitelist that allows access to a PolarDB cluster.

DBClusterIPArrayName.description:
The name of the IP address whitelist group. If you do not specify this parameter,
the Default whitelist group is modified by default.
Note You can create up to 50 whitelist groups for an ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster.

DBClusterId.description: The ID of the ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster whose IP address whitelist is to be modified.

SecurityIps.description:
The IP addresses to be added to the IP address whitelist group to be modified. Each
whitelist group can contain a maximum of 1,000 IP addresses. Separate multiple IP
addresses with a comma (,). The following two formats are supported:
IP address: for example, 10.23.12.24.
Classless inter-domain routing (CIDR) block: for example, 10.23.12.24/24, where the
suffix /24 indicates the number of bits for the prefix of the IP address. The suffix
ranges from 1 to 32.

DBClusterId.description: The ID of the ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster whose IP address whitelist is to be modified.

ALIYUN::POLARDB::DBClusterEndpoint.description: ALIYUN::POLARDB::DBClusterEndpoint is used to create a custom endpoint for a PolarDB cluster.

AutoAddNewNodes.description:
Specifies whether a newly added node is automatically added to this connection point.
Valid values: Enable, Disable.
Default value: Disable.

DBClusterId.description: The ID of the ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster for which a custom connection point is to be created.

EndpointType.description: The type of the cluster connection point. Set this parameter to Custom.

Nodes.description:
The nodes to be added to this connection point to process read requests from this connection point. Add at least two nodes.
If you do not specify this parameter, all nodes of the cluster are added to this connection point by default.

ReadWriteMode.description:
The read/write mode of the cluster connection point. Valid values:
ReadWrite: receives and forwards read and write requests (automatic read-write splitting).
ReadOnly: receives and forwards only read requests.
Default value: ReadOnly.

Addresses.description: The address items of the db cluster endpoint.

ConnectionString.description: The first connection string of the db cluster endpoint.

DBEndpointId.description: DB cluster endpoint ID. E.g. pe-xxxxxxxx.

ALIYUN::POLARDB::DBClusterEndpointAddres.description: ALIYUN::POLARDB::DBClusterEndpointAddress is used to create a public endpoint for an Apsara PolarDB cluster. The public endpoint can be a primary endpoint, the default cluster endpoint, or a custom cluster endpoint.

ConnectionStringPrefix.description:
The prefix of the connection string. The prefix must comply with the following rules:
It must start with a letter and consist of lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens(-), cannot end with a dash.
The length is 6~30 characters.

DBClusterId.description: The ID of the ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster for which a public connection point is to be created.

DBEndpointId.description: The ID of the cluster connection point.

NetType.description:
The network type of the connection string. 
If set to Public, ROS will create, modify and delete Public address for you.
If set to Private, ROS will only modify Private address for you.
Default to Public.

Address.description: The details of the endpoint address.

ConnectionString.description: The connection string of the endpoint address.

ALIYUN::POLARDB::DBNodes.description: ALIYUN::POLARDB::DBNodes is used to add nodes to a PolarDB cluster.

Amount.description: Number of nodes to be added to cluster.

DBClusterId.description: The ID of the ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster to be added nodes to.

EndpointBindList.description: Address IDs that specifies the cluster connection address to which the new node should join.

ImciSwitch.description: Specifies whether to enable the In-Memory Column Index (IMCI) feature.

PlannedEndTime.description: The latest time at which a new node task can be added to start executing a timed (that is, within the target time period). The format is YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ (UTC).

PlannedStartTime.description: The earliest time at which a new node task can be added to start executing a timed (that is, within the target time period). The format is YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ (UTC).

ResourceGroupId.description: Resource group id.

DBNodeIds.description: The ID list of added cluster nodes.

OrderIds.description: The order ID list of added cluster nodes.

ALIYUN::POLARDB::Database.description: ALIYUN::POLARDB::Database is used to create a database in a PolarDB cluster.

AccountName.description: The name of the database account to be used.

AccountPrivilege.description:
The permissions of the database account on the database. Valid values:
ReadWrite: has read and write permissions on the database.
ReadOnly: has the read-only permission on the database.
DMLOnly: runs only data manipulation language (DML) statements.
DDLOnly: runs only data definition language (DDL) statements.
ReadIndex: has read and index permissions on the database.
Default value: ReadWrite.

CharacterSetName.description: The character set of the database. For more information, see Character sets.

Ctype.description:
A locale setting that specifies the character classification of the database.
The locale must be compatible with the character set set by the CharacterSetName parameter.
It is consistent with the incoming information of Collate.
When the cluster is PolarDB PostgreSQL (compatible with Oracle) or PolarDB PostgreSQL, this parameter is required;
 when the cluster is PolarDB MySQL, this parameter is optional.

DBClusterId.description: The ID of the ApsaraDB for POLARDB cluster for which a database is to be created.

DBDescription.description:
The description of the database. Valid values:
It cannot start with http:// or https://.
It must be 2 to 256 characters in length.

DBName.description:
The name of the database to be created. The name must comply with the following rules:
It must start with a lowercase letter and consist of lowercase letters, digits, hyphens
(-), and underscores (_).
It must end with a letter or a digit. It can be up to 64 characters in length.

ALIYUN::POLARDB::GlobalDatabaseNetwork.description: ALIYUN::POLARDB::GlobalDatabaseNetwork is used to create a global database network (GDN).

DbClusterId.description: The ID of the primary cluster.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of the resource group.

Connections.description: The information about the connection to the cluster.

CreateTime.description: The time at which the GDN was created.

DbClusters.description: The clusters that are included in the GDN.

DbType.description: The type of the database engine.

DbVersion.description: The version of the database engine.

ALIYUN::POLARDB::GlobalSecurityIPGroup.description: ALIYUN::POLARDB::GlobalSecurityIPGroup is used to create a global IP whitelist template.

GIpList.description:
The IP addresses in the whitelist template.
You can create up to 1,000 IP addresses or CIDR blocks for all IP whitelists.

GlobalIgName.description:
The name of the IP whitelist template. The name must meet the following requirements:
The name can contain lowercase letters, digits, and underscores (_).
The name must start with a letter and end with a letter or digit.
The name must be 2 to 120 characters in length.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of the resource group.

GlobalSecurityGroupId.description: The ID of the IP whitelist template.

ALIYUN::POLARDB::ParameterGroup.description: ALIYUN::POLARDB::ParameterGroup is used to create a parameter template of PolarDB.

DbType.description: The type of the database engine.

DbVersion.description: The version of the database engine.

ParameterGroupDesc.description: The description of the parameter template.

ParameterGroupName.description: The name of the parameter template.

Parameters.description: The list of the parameters.

ResourceGroupId.description: The ID of the resource group.

CreateTime.description: The time when the parameter template was created.

DbType.description: The type of the database engine.

DbVersion.description: The version of the database engine.

ForceRestart.description: Indicates whether to restart the cluster when this parameter template is applied.

ParameterCounts.description: The number of parameters in the parameter template.

ParameterGroupDesc.description: The description of the parameter template.

ParameterGroupId.description: The ID of the parameter group.

ParameterGroupName.description: The name of the parameter template.

ParameterGroupType.description: The type of the parameter template.

Parameters.description: The list of the parameters.

ALIYUN::PVTZ::Rule.description: ALIYUN::PVTZ::Rule is used to add a forwarding rule.

RuleName.description: The name of the forwarding rule.

Type.description:
The type of the forwarding rule. Valid value:
OUTBOUND: forwards Domain Name System (DNS) traffic to one or more external IP addresses.

ZoneName.description: The domain name that requires DNS traffic forwarding.

CreateTime.description: The timestamp when the forwarding rule was created.

ForwardIp.description: The information about each destination external server.

RuleName.description: The name of the forwarding rule.

Type.description: The type of the forwarding rule.

Vpcs.description: The information about each virtual private cloud (VPC) that is associated with the forwarding rule.

ZoneName.description: The domain name that requires Domain Name System (DNS) traffic forwarding.

ALIYUN::PVTZ::SyncEcsHost.description: ALIYUN::PVTZ::SyncEcsHost is used to create a hostname synchronization task.

Regions.description: A list of region information to be synchronized.

Status.description: The host synchronizes the task state. Valid values: ON, OFF.

ZoneId.description: Zone ID, a unique identifier for the Zone.

ALIYUN::PVTZ::UserVpcAuthorization.description: ALIYUN::PVTZ::UserVpcAuthorization is used to associate virtual private clouds (VPCs) across accounts.

AuthChannel.description:
Authorization channel. Valid values:
AUTH_CODE: Verification code authorization, to verify whether the verification code passed in by AuthCode is correct.
RESOURCE_DIRECTORY: Resource directory authorization, verify whether the AuthorizedUserId and the current account have resource directory credit.When it is empty, it is the same as AUTH_CODE, that is, verification code authorization.

AuthCode.description: Verification code, if AuthChannel takes "AUTH_CODE" or is empty, it is mandatory.

- FAST_ZONE: Fast zone (Recommended: directly reply to the parsing request, the parsing delay is the lowest, and the record changes take effect in real time; Support custom line analysis, weight analysis.

ProxyPattern.description:
ZONE: completely hijack the entire zone.
RECORD: Incomplete hijacking, recursive resolution agent.
Default to ZONE.

Remark.description: 50 characters at most. It can only contain numbers, Chinese, English and special characters: "_-,.，。".

Period.description: The unit of the billing cycle for the instance. The valid values vary based on the billing method. If you use the subscription billing method, set the value to Year or Month. If you use the pay-as-you-go billing method, the value is automatically set to Hour.

TopologyType.description: The topology type of the instance. Valid values: 3azones: The instance is deployed in three zones. 1azone: The instance is deployed in only one zone.

UsedTime.description: The subscription period of the instance. Unit: month or year. Note When period is set to year, the supported values of this parameter are 1, 2 and 3.

DBInstanceName.description: The name of the instance that you create.

ALIYUN::PrivateLink::VpcEndpoint.description: ALIYUN::PrivateLink::VpcEndpoint is used to create an endpoint.

EndpointDescription.description:
The description of the endpoint.
The description must be 2 to 256 characters in length and cannot start with http:// or https://.

EndpointName.description:
The name of the endpoint.
The name must be 2 to 128 characters in length and can contain digits, underscores
(_), and hyphens (-). The name must start with a letter.

ProtectedEnabled.description:
Specifies whether to enable user authentication. This parameter is available in Security Token Service (STS) mode. Valid values:
true: yes After user authentication is enabled, only the user who creates the endpoint can modify or delete the endpoint in STS mode.
false (default): no

SecurityGroupId.description: The security group associated with the endpoint network interface. The security group can control the data communication from the VPC to the endpoint network interface.

ServiceId.description: The endpoint service that is associated with the endpoint. One of ServiceId and ServiceName is required.

ServiceName.description: The name of the endpoint service that is associated with the endpoint. One of ServiceId and ServiceName is required.

Tags.description: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

VpcId.description: The VPC to which the endpoint belongs.

ZonePrivateIpAddressCount.description: The number of private IP addresses that can be used by an elastic network interface (ENI) in each zone. Set the value to 1.

Bandwidth.description: The bandwidth of the endpoint.

EndpointDomain.description: The domain name of the endpoint.

ServiceId.description: The ID of endpoint service that is associated with the endpoint.

ServiceName.description: The name of endpoint service that is associated with the endpoint.

VpcId.description: The vpc ID of endpoint.

true: automatically accepts endpoint connection requests.
false: does not automatically accept endpoint connection requests.

ConnectBandwidth.description: The default maximum bandwidth of the endpoint connection. Valid values: 100 to 1024. Unit: Mbit/s.

DeletionForce.description:

- True

Payer.description:
The payer of the endpoint service. Valid values: 
Endpoint: the service consumer. 
EndpointService: the service provider.

ServiceDescription.description: The description for the endpoint service.

Tags.description: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

ZoneAffinityEnabled.description:
Specifies whether to resolve domain names to IP addresses in the nearest zone.
true: yes. 
false (default): no

MinBandwidth.description: The minimum bandwidth of the endpoint connection.

ALIYUN::PrivateLink::VpcEndpointServiceA.description: ALIYUN::PrivateLink::VpcEndpointServiceAttachment is used to add a service resource to an endpoint service.

ResourceType.description:
The resource type. Allowed values:
- slb: indicates a Classic Load Balancer (CLB) instance whose service resource type is a private network and supports the PrivateLink function.
- alb: indicates an Application Load Balancer (ALB) instance whose service resources are private networks and which supports the PrivateLink function.
- nlb: indicates a Network Load Balancer (NLB) instance that uses private network resources and supports the PrivateLink function.

ALIYUN::RAM::AccessKey.description: The ALIYUN::RAM::AccessKey resource type retrieves a specified RAM user’s AccessKey ID, AccessKey secret, and AccessKey status.

UserName.description: Specifies the user name, containing up to 64 characters.

ALIYUN::RAM::AppSecret.description: ALIYUN::RAM::AppSecret is used to create an application secret.

AppSecretId.description: The ID of the application secret.

AppSecretValue.description: The content of the application secret. This value can be used as the client secret for open authorization.

ALIYUN::RAM::Application.description: ALIYUN::RAM::Application is used to create an application.

AccessTokenValidity.description:
The validity period of the access token.
Valid values: 900 to 10800. Unit: seconds.
Default value: 3600.

AppName.description: The name of the application. The name can be up to 64 characters in length. The name can contain letters, digits, periods (.), underscores (_), and hyphens (-).

AppType.description:
The type of the application. Valid values:
- **WebApp**: a web application that interacts with a browser.
- **NativeApp**: a native application that runs on an operating system, such as a desktop operating system or a mobile operating system.
- **ServerApp**: an application that accesses Alibaba Cloud services without the need of manual user logon. User provisioning is automated based on the System for Cross-Domain Identity Management (SCIM) protocol.

DisplayName.description: The display name of the application. The name can be up to 24 characters in length.

IsMultiTenant.description:
Indicates whether the application can be installed by using other Alibaba Cloud accounts. Valid values:
- **true**: If you do not set this parameter for applications of the NativeApp and ServerApp types, true is used.
- **false**: If you do not set this parameter for applications of the WebApp type, false is used.

PredefinedScopes.description: List of the scopes of application permissions.

RefreshTokenValidity.description:
The validity period of the refreshed token.
Valid values: 7200 to 31536000. Unit: seconds.
Default value:
- For applications of the WebApp and ServerApp types, if this parameter is left empty, the value 2592000 is used. The value 2592000 indicates that the validity period of the refreshed token is 30 days.
- For applications of the NativeApp type, if this parameter is left empty, the value 7776000 is used. The value 7776000 indicates that the validity period of the refreshed token is 90 days.

RequiredScopes.description:
Required scope of application permissions. You can set one or more of the scopes set in the **PredefinedScopes** to be required, so that when a user authorizes the application, the required scopes are selected by default and cannot be canceled.
**Notes**: If you set a **RequiredScopes** entry that is not within the scope of **PredefinedScopes**, the required range will not take effect.

SecretRequired.description:
Indicates whether a secret is required. Valid values: **true** and **false**.
**Note**:
- For applications of the WebApp and ServerApp types, this parameter is automatically set to **true** and cannot be changed.
- For applications of the NativeApp type, this parameter can be set to true or false. If you do not set this parameter, false is used. Applications of the NativeApp type run in untrusted environments and the secrets of these applications are not protected. Therefore, we recommend that you do not set this parameter to true unless otherwise specified.

IgnoreExisting.description:
Whether to ignore existing group
False: ROS will perform a uniqueness check.If a group with the same name exists, an error will be reported when creating it.
True: ROS will not check the uniqueness.If there is a group with the same name, the group creation process will be ignored.
If the group is not created by ROS, it will be ignored during update and delete stage.

MFABindRequired.description:
Whether to force RAM users to enable multi-factor authentication. Valid values:
- true: This is required. RAM users must bind the multifactor authentication device the next time they log in.
- false (default) : This is not required.

Password.description: The password of the RAM user.

PasswordResetRequired.description: Whether RAM users must reset their password the next time they log in.

Status.description:
Enable or disable console password login. Valid values:
- Activate (default): Enable.
- Inactivate: Disable.

UserPrincipalName.description: The login name of the RAM user.

Password.description: The password of the RAM user.

ALIYUN::RAM::ManagedPolicy.description: ALIYUN::RAM::ManagedPolicy is used to create a Resource Access Management (RAM) policy.

Description.description: Specifies the authorization policy description, containing up to 1024 characters.

Groups.description: The names of groups to attach to this policy.

IgnoreExisting.description:
Whether to ignore existing policy
False: ROS will perform a uniqueness check.If a policy with the same name exists, an error will be reported when creating it.
True: ROS will not check the uniqueness.If there is a policy with the same name, the policy creation process will be ignored.
If the policy is not created by ROS, it will be ignored during update and delete stage.

PolicyDocument.description: A policy document that describes what actions are allowed on which resources.

PolicyDocumentUnchecked.description: A policy document that describes what actions are allowed on which resources. If it is specified, PolicyDocument will be ignored.

PolicyName.description: Specifies the authorization policy name, containing up to 128 characters.

Roles.description: The names of roles to attach to this policy.

Users.description: The names of users to attach to this policy.
